name: Christy Smith
subject: Crossing the finish line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

When I first decided to run for Congress, I certainly never could have imagined the position we would be in now.

In fact, I never expected to run for Congress -- I started with my daughters' school board because I saw an opportunity to bring about change where it was needed.

**And that's what I see now more than ever. We need and deserve a leader who will work hard to get the solutions we need to some of our biggest problems.**

My opponent doesn't even have the guts to stand up to Donald Trump when he says something ridiculous -- whether it's suggesting people drink cleaning products to stay safe from COVID or downplaying the severity of this crisis.**I most certainly do.**

But right now, we're in jeopardy of falling short of our fundraising goals and if we do, we won't be able to fight for the change we need. Instead, we'll have another enabler of Trump's divisive politics.

**[The choice is clear in who we need in Congress -- I promise to be a leader with strong convictions and a big heart. Republican special interests are increasing their spending, and I need your help now to make sure we win in just a few days. Can you chip in now?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01df/3728346395/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_onemillion12full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01d8/3728346395/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_onemillion12full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01d9/3728346395/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_onemillion12full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01da/3728346395/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_onemillion12full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01db/3728346395/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_onemillion12full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01d4/3728346395/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_onemillion12full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01df/3728346395/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_onemillion12full")
These next few days are so important to our race. Under normal circumstances, I would be out knocking on doors all across the district -- but instead, I'll be making phone calls and sending texts (like so many of our incredible volunteers!).

This race is incredibly close -- no one can predict how it will end up.**But what I know is this -- no one is working harder than us to make sure we win this seat and have the right representative in Congress.**

**[Help us cross the finish line -- pitch in $5 or whatever you can today to make it happen.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01df/3728346395/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_onemillion12full")**

Thanks so much, Peter. I'm so lucky to have you on my team.

\-- Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01df/3728346395/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_onemillion12full")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

[**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf9/29776869/a6cc6a8/569f01d7/3728346395/VEsHBw/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

subject: Did you see me on Fox News this morning?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:

| Friends, I went on Fox News this morning to discuss the COVID-19 pandemic and what we can do to contain this virus and get back to work. I believe we need a vertical containment strategy, where we quarantine those that are higher at risk, and get the rest of the country back to work. [In fact, our campaign released a plan describing this in further detail just the other week.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkltzhd-uunkhiuw-y/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkltzhd-uunkhiuw-j/) [Watch My Full interview with fox news here](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkltzhd-uunkhiuw-t/) We need a Senator who will work alongside President Trump to implement real strategies and real solutions to our nation's toughest problems. name: Tina Ramirez
subject: National Day of Prayer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC
body:
Quick Update
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkligdl-udthdyhkil-i/)
| | | Friend, As you probably know, the first Thursday of May each year we come together as One Nation Under God to celebrate with a National Day of Prayer -- and what better time to reaffirm our nation's faith than during a time of crisis? America's Founders knew the importance of religious freedom. The God of the Bible is mentioned in our Declaration of Independence, acknowledged in our Constitution, and even declared in our Pledge of Allegiance. As a nation founded on Faith, I’m proud of my Faith — and I’ll never apologize for my beliefs or my convictions. More and more we see religious freedom being attacked by the media and the liberal left — that's why I started a global organization to promote and teach religious freedom. As your voice in Washington, you can count on this... I will ALWAYS stand up for EVERY American's right to worship according to their religious beliefs. Today, I am asking you to join me in praying -- praying for those affected by COVID-19, for those who are struggling to find work, for those who have lost a loved one, and for those who are fighting on the frontlines of this pandemic. Thank You, Tina Ramirez
---
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Phase 1 of reopening starts May 9th. Here's what does (and doesn't!) change.
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Because of the amazing work that you and other Rhode Islanders have done to limit the spread of COVID-19, we're ready to test the waters of reopening. To be clear, life next week won't look that much different than it does right now. We are going to reopen our economy slowly and cautiously to defend against any further outbreaks. Even when the stay at home order lifts, we should still be staying close to home.
Today, I want to give you an overview of which restrictions we're going to relax in Phase 1 and which ones we are going to renew.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vFfd_CtTcU9pCl6dpEaWk6L0yNVT-mu52_YcZP-i5WoSkjGjINfOHaV9T-9VKxilwLLo4hd93u8e11W2zusLi2j_vMycOTwXbGPjoceU_3pnbjdAi0pw8RHXG_zV1pUJXaJbAQfvv7dUtgOCCq8ZYn2NMeh2df1R1OdQ43v5XE5JWWjQLuAzhMT26gLcQ9UR9RFAB1HTN1Y=&c=27HS3O9Z-lvgwMQobVc9tWovQh5Ad9WIySHk-Y_F3TnuLjc_7AH9oQ==&ch=pXH_bUIGoB9HHa9iJ6chMnSMKi2VTNRb28K7kOUnFot3n4_t20OpyA==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vFfd_CtTcU9pCl6dpEaWk6L0yNVT-mu52_YcZP-i5WoSkjGjINfOHaV9T-9VKxilwLLo4hd93u8e11W2zusLi2j_vMycOTwXbGPjoceU_3pnbjdAi0pw8RHXG_zV1pUJXaJbAQfvv7dUtgOCCq8ZYn2NMeh2df1R1OdQ43v5XE5JWWjQLuAzhMT26gLcQ9UR9RFAB1HTN1Y=&c=27HS3O9Z-lvgwMQobVc9tWovQh5Ad9WIySHk-Y_F3TnuLjc_7AH9oQ==&ch=pXH_bUIGoB9HHa9iJ6chMnSMKi2VTNRb28K7kOUnFot3n4_t20OpyA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| The following changes will happen with the start of Phase 1 on May 9:

* Non-critical retail stores will reopen with [capacity limits](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vFfd_CtTcU9pCl6dpEaWk6L0yNVT-mu52_YcZP-i5WoSkjGjINfOHdxk-V8PQuXQC0Er1qUmhghB1NMbVCQou2dbXbG_18s84MXHjOV3isEc31B2mSzUGdm1yuxkI_yKcgL1iWZogtdeK200jIvlhyfLaHoDGOnelQfSjNp-vBw_vD6wc3iuQuQz87lTirOdPeWz5WxP-eu1sIr7e_99iTU3Ra7F4j2pGbLuTihA2jM=&c=27HS3O9Z-lvgwMQobVc9tWovQh5Ad9WIySHk-Y_F3TnuLjc_7AH9oQ==&ch=pXH_bUIGoB9HHa9iJ6chMnSMKi2VTNRb28K7kOUnFot3n4_t20OpyA==).
* Anyone who has deferred health care needs should call their doctor and ask about an in-person visit.
* Elective medical procedures resume under safety guidelines.
* Offices can start allowing people to come and go on a [very limited basis](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vFfd_CtTcU9pCl6dpEaWk6L0yNVT-mu52_YcZP-i5WoSkjGjINfOHdxk-V8PQuXQfxX3VO7YdL27dy8SZTwETYbCjiCrca6-X5PBUtEcJnauUmtbX05LOWMHrgUbwt0DgZIqA0gkgvIN5jB9eAJWutaHVFHd8T-7FCO_ZOg9IFDdnzIImiVon_SXy1UCN28G9lw1rWfSMpxpdBvoABwihDWukKcvG_Vprr7pMtfLzdAoxCZzwR5SD56pyyNJIHiV&c=27HS3O9Z-lvgwMQobVc9tWovQh5Ad9WIySHk-Y_F3TnuLjc_7AH9oQ==&ch=pXH_bUIGoB9HHa9iJ6chMnSMKi2VTNRb28K7kOUnFot3n4_t20OpyA==).
* [Some state parks](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vFfd_CtTcU9pCl6dpEaWk6L0yNVT-mu52_YcZP-i5WoSkjGjINfOHe5THIE_HBPnaBpMsFyFezOV6NaVZAv3cp6NyVWTmYBLVPyf6VO7-xkKz8bFC181GpneWvyxeReiz2f1SVLAwVv4CsH6V3tMdVxLRzB_3VF-95ViicjR1Ko=&c=27HS3O9Z-lvgwMQobVc9tWovQh5Ad9WIySHk-Y_F3TnuLjc_7AH9oQ==&ch=pXH_bUIGoB9HHa9iJ6chMnSMKi2VTNRb28K7kOUnFot3n4_t20OpyA==) will reopen with limited parking.

That still leaves most of our restrictions in place. You will still need to wear a mask, you will still need to social distance, and you will still need to wash your hands thoroughly and frequently. It also still leaves in place the restrictions around social gatherings. We've done a good job of flattening the curve, and I'm confident that we can now slowly start to reopen. But I am also mindful that we are going ahead of our neighbors, and we don't want to rush into this. So, for now, we're still going to have to take it slow. When the stay at home order lifts tomorrow, social gatherings will remain limited to 5 people through May 22.
In that spirit, I am also going to [extend a number of my executive orders](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vFfd_CtTcU9pCl6dpEaWk6L0yNVT-mu52_YcZP-i5WoSkjGjINfOHdxk-V8PQuXQV_JKuXtGMdULpQotmElul5sWEQ_hmmVLmdgyfOLMFw56uC6PByzk5swiTLsKJxnGASwBGl91kwssx-vhUgpCqgSb8ybXcJADpcfg4m5Ax7eGiHu21fhVplAwDKFOiy1s2rfiMPStfjQ=&c=27HS3O9Z-lvgwMQobVc9tWovQh5Ad9WIySHk-Y_F3TnuLjc_7AH9oQ==&ch=pXH_bUIGoB9HHa9iJ6chMnSMKi2VTNRb28K7kOUnFot3n4_t20OpyA==). The following orders will extend through May 22:

* Domestic Travel: Anyone coming to Rhode Island from any other state for purpose other than work, medical treatment, or obtaining necessities by any mode of transportation must self-quarantine for 14 days.
* Restaurant dine-in: Restaurants, bars and cafes will remain closed to dine-in service. Wine and beer can still be sold with take-out orders. In addition, starting Saturday, we will also allow restaurants and bars to sell mixed drinks in sealed containers.
* Businesses closures: Recreation and entertainment businesses, such as theaters, concert venues, and museums, will remain closed. Close-contact businesses, like fitness centers and salons, will also remain closed.

In addition, the following executive orders will be extended to June 5:

* International Travel: Anyone coming to Rhode Island from outside of the country must self-quarantine for 14 days.
* Quarantining: Anyone who has been diagnosed with coronavirus by a lab test or by a doctor who has assessed your symptoms must isolate until cleared based on RIDOH guidance. If you don't have coronavirus symptoms but you've been in close contact with someone who has been diagnosed with the coronavirus, you also must quarantine for 14 days.
* Gun Permits: In keeping with a request from the RI Police Chiefs' Association we have extended the time period that law enforcement has to complete a background for a gun permit from 7 days to 30 days.
* Telehealth: Health insurers must cover telemedicine for primary care, specialty care and mental and behavioral health care. In addition we've also ordered burdensome regulations around referrals and prior authorizations that stand in the way of patients accessing the care to be relaxed.

---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vFfd_CtTcU9pCl6dpEaWk6L0yNVT-mu52_YcZP-i5WoSkjGjINfOHdxk-V8PQuXQXB3SVu7-vUv63ZYVyeDjiyo7TEZ-BwWJ_3ZebX3pdGvyQ-zWch7zH3J1ZKyLYvlmd8TxQZ21x4bxePNnwZZ3pPlh8RFwP9AwqdMDYjZmnohZ99Dz6b2b23i1lldNKB9qQZht2u4g6nU=&c=27HS3O9Z-lvgwMQobVc9tWovQh5Ad9WIySHk-Y_F3TnuLjc_7AH9oQ==&ch=pXH_bUIGoB9HHa9iJ6chMnSMKi2VTNRb28K7kOUnFot3n4_t20OpyA==)
---
| We have to reopen in a smart, organized, and cautious way. That's why this first phase is really just testing the waters.I know it may be disappointing to many Rhode Islanders that we're still a long ways away from normal, but we will get there together. If we all follow the new rules while enjoying greater flexibility in Phase 1, then we'll be able to move on to Phase 2 in as soon as two weeks.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update | | | | | | | Hello friend, Because of the amazing work that you and other Rhode Islanders have done to limit the spread of COVID-19, we're ready to test the waters of reopening. To be clear, life next week won't look that much different than it does right now. We are going to reopen our economy slowly and cautiously to defend against any further outbreaks. Even when the stay at home order lifts, we should still be staying close to home. Today, I want to give you an overview of which restrictions we're going to relax in Phase 1 and which ones we are going to renew. | == | To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's == for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island. | The following changes will happen with the start of Phase 1 on May 9: Non-critical retail stores will reopen with ==. Anyone who has deferred health care needs should call their doctor and ask about an in-person visit. Elective medical procedures resume under safety guidelines. Offices can start allowing people to come and go on a ==. == will reopen with limited parking. That still leaves most of our restrictions in place. You will still need to wear a mask, you will still need to social distance, and you will still need to wash your hands thoroughly and frequently. It also still leaves in place the restrictions around social gatherings. We've done a good job of flattening the curve, and I'm confident that we can now slowly start to reopen. But I am also mindful that we are going ahead of our neighbors, and we don't want to rush into this. So, for now, we're still going to have to take it slow. When the stay at home order lifts tomorrow, social gatherings will remain limited to 5 people through May 22. In that spirit, I am also going to ==. The following orders will extend through May 22: Domestic Travel: Anyone coming to Rhode Island from any other state for purpose other than work, medical treatment, or obtaining necessities by any mode of transportation must self-quarantine for 14 days. Restaurant dine-in: Restaurants, bars and cafes will remain closed to dine-in service. Wine and beer can still be sold with take-out orders. In addition, starting Saturday, we will also allow restaurants and bars to sell mixed drinks in sealed containers. Businesses closures: Recreation and entertainment businesses, such as theaters, concert venues, and museums, will remain closed. Close-contact businesses, like fitness centers and salons, will also remain closed. In addition, the following executive orders will be extended to June 5: International Travel: Anyone coming to Rhode Island from outside of the country must self-quarantine for 14 days. Quarantining: Anyone who has been diagnosed with coronavirus by a lab test or by a doctor who has assessed your symptoms must isolate until cleared based on RIDOH guidance. If you don't have coronavirus symptoms but you've been in close contact with someone who has been diagnosed with the coronavirus, you also must quarantine for 14 days. Gun Permits: In keeping with a request from the RI Police Chiefs' Association we have extended the time period that law enforcement has to complete a background for a gun permit from 7 days to 30 days. Telehealth: Health insurers must cover telemedicine for primary care, specialty care and mental and behavioral health care. In addition we've also ordered burdensome regulations around referrals and prior authorizations that stand in the way of patients accessing the care to be relaxed. | == | We have to reopen in a smart, organized, and cautious way. That's why this first phase is really just testing the waters.I know it may be disappointing to many Rhode Islanders that we're still a long ways away from normal, but we will get there together. If we all follow the new rules while enjoying greater flexibility in Phase 1, then we'll be able to move on to Phase 2 in as soon as two weeks. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

subject: Welcome to Tea Party Patriots Action - Part 4: Join with Others
body:
**1** **WE’RE GRASSROOTS** **2** **MAKE A DIFFERENCE** **3** **STAY INFORMED** **4** **JOIN WITH OTHERS** | |
---
**Tea Party Patriots depend on grassroots activism where it counts: near you.** Your community is where you live, work and pursue your American dream. It is also were you can have the greatest individual impact.
|
---
Local Groups

History has proven that the ability to organize people to focus on specific issues has a huge impact on elected officials. Most politicians will cater to those blocs that they perceive as being able to help (or hurt) them the most at the ballot box. This is because politics begins on the local level.

Local Groups are the backbone of our activities across the nation. Our cause is driven by concerned Americans like you, who strive to inform, educate and engage their community about the issues that affect all of our lives. All around the country, Tea Party Patriots have formed Local Groups to coordinate action and promote the values we share.
|

Dear Friend, The American people have made tremendous sacrifices in the last two months to create a window of opportunity to develop a plan so we can venture out and restart the economy safely. The administration squandered the opportunity, publishing ambiguous reopening criteria (which many states are now ignoring) and failing to develop a test/trace/isolate/quarantine capability that would give us confidence that further outbreaks could be identified and contained. In the last week, we've seen the Trump administration simply give up on developing a coherent response to the pandemic that balances economic and public health imperatives. I suppose after 40 years of purposefully eroding people's trust in government, trying to shrink it to the point "you can drown it in a bathtub", and dismantling the very team that was put in place to deal with this scenario, it is indeed nearly impossible to develop an effective response when you're in the midst of the crisis. Pete Sessions was in congress for 20 of those 40 years, voting consistently to deprive Americans of health care and earning a 0% rating from the American Public Health Association. **That’s why we clean_body: But We Do Want Smart Government | Dear Friend, The American people have made tremendous sacrifices in the last two months to create a window of opportunity to develop a plan so we can venture out and restart the economy safely. The administration squandered the opportunity, publishing ambiguous reopening criteria (which many states are now ignoring) and failing to develop a test/trace/isolate/quarantine capability that would give us confidence that further outbreaks could be identified and contained. In the last week, we've seen the Trump administration simply give up on developing a coherent response to the pandemic that balances economic and public health imperatives. I suppose after 40 years of purposefully eroding people's trust in government, trying to shrink it to the point "you can drown it in a bathtub", and dismantling the very team that was put in place to deal with this scenario, it is indeed nearly impossible to develop an effective response when you're in the midst of the crisis. Pete Sessions was in congress for 20 of those 40 years, voting consistently to deprive Americans of health care and earning a 0% rating from the American Public Health Association. That’s why we need your help with=, because allowing Sessions to go back to Congress would only lead to repeating the mistakes that got us here. If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, and stay safe. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: I'm calling for an investigation...
body:
The Communist Chinese regime lied about the Wuhan coronavirus
Peter,The Communist Chinese regime lied about the Wuhan coronavirus and the World Health Organization's leadership has been their accomplice since the beginning.I appreciate President Trump's decision to suspend funding for the WHO and believe **there must be a full investigation.** We just released a new ad exposing China and their relationship with the WHO. You can [**watch it by clicking here.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pomn-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pomn-fuutjhhtj-y/) [WATCH: China And Their Relationship With The WHO](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pomn-fuutjhhtj-j/) By parroting the regime's talking points, the WHO added legitimacy to China's cover-up, which diverted the world from the truth -- costing valuable time and placing millions of lives at risk.[**You can watch the ad here.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pomn-fuutjhhtj-t/) Thank you for your time.Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pomn-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pomn-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pomn-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pomn-fuutjhhtj-o/)

name: Betsy
subject: Budget cuts on the backs of our kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
_**Children first.**_ **That 's the Republican approach to budget cuts. ** In the face of the pandemic, dealing with the consequences of years of tax cuts for the wealthiest and tax exemptions for selected corporations, __here 's what they want to cut:__
* **$300 million in K-12 school funding**
* **$110 million in college and university funding**
* **$210 million in Medicaid spending**

Ohio already ranks 3rd highest in the nation for children who were uninsured, largely because of its mismanaged Medicaid system. Our funding for public education has been ruled unconstitutionally inadequate for decades. Our public universities are already some of the least affordable in the country. But once again, this is where the Republicans strike. _Kids can 't vote. And they can't write big checks. But I'll stand up for them._ We can fix Ohio's upside-down tax structure, address the $9 billion in unfair tax loopholes, make good use of the $2.7 billion in Ohio's Rainy Day fund, and insist the federal government extend assistance to state and local governments. | **We can do this Ohio,** **but not on the backs** **of our children.** **Please donate $25 now** **to build a brighter** **tomorrow.** [****](https://act.myngp.com/el/AiwmHztt7r9BnYeQDs-B_qWhqem8gYubdFXWjyHxFl8=/FTCeZHXO6PTdLICKWxCGFAfDgQ84CHlDfwpheFx2yXk=?refcode=budget1&amount=25)

name: Unite the Country
subject: Our new ad shows Joe Biden is the leader Americans deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
The ad highlights Joe Biden's economic leadership with the Recovery Act & Auto Rescue
#
Peter --
This morning we released our newest ad supporting Joe Biden and wanted you to be one of the first to know. The ad, "Deserve," tells the story of Joe Biden's working-class roots, the values that define him, and his leadership during the last economic crisis.
Voters see the disastrous presidency of Donald Trump every single day as his actions cause chaos, endanger lives and weaken our economy. It's time for voters to hear about Joe Biden's leadership during tough times.
**This new ad kicks off our Pre-Convention Campaign to support Joe Biden. Will you watch it and then share with your social networks?**
[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df765d/287b9173/2b05a565/7e7673d1/2674609214/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/SzjGuyJ4VX")
**[WATCH ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df765d/287b9173/2b05a565/7e7673d1/2674609214/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/SzjGuyJ4VX")**
**[WATCH ON FACEBOOK](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df765d/287b9173/2b05a565/7e7673d2/2674609214/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC/videos/277199106783471/")**
As Vice President, Joe Biden oversaw the implementation of the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act, which invested in small businesses, the auto industry, health care workers, teachers, and first responders. It also was widley credited with staving off economic disaster with little to no government waste. Joe Biden's record of leadership stands in stark contrast to how Donald Trump has responded to the current national emergency.
Will you share our new ad with [**your friends on Facebook**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df765d/287b9173/2b05a565/7e7673d2/2674609214/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC/videos/277199106783471/") and [**your followers on Twitter**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df765d/287b9173/2b05a565/7e7673d1/2674609214/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/SzjGuyJ4VX")?
Onward,
Unite the Country

The ad highlights Joe Biden's economic leadership with the Recovery Act & Auto Rescue [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df765d/287b9173/2b05a565/7e7673d3/2674609214/VEsA/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://facebook.com/unitethecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df765d/287b9173/2b05a565/7e7673dc/2674609214/VEsB/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://twitter.com/unitecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df765d/287b9173/2b05a565/7e7673dd/2674609214/VEsO/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://instagram.com/unitethecountry")

The ad, "Deserve," tells the story of Joe Biden's working-class roots, the values that define him, and his leadership during the last economic crisis. Voters see the disastrous presidency of Donald Trump every single day as his actions cause chaos, endanger lives and weaken our economy. It's time for voters to hear about Joe Biden's leadership during tough times. This new ad kicks off our Pre-Convention Campaign to support Joe Biden. Will you watch it and then share with your social networks? "" "" "" As Vice President, Joe Biden oversaw the implementation of the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act, which invested in small businesses, the auto industry, health care workers, teachers, and first responders. It also was widley credited with staving off economic disaster with little to no government waste. Joe Biden's record of leadership stands in stark contrast to how Donald Trump has responded to the current national emergency. Will you share our new ad with "" and ""? Onward, Unite the Country The ad highlights Joe Biden's economic leadership with the Recovery Act & Auto Rescue "" "" "" * Paid for by Unite the Country, "", and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

There’s this narrative that Mitch McConnell is the most “powerful” man in the Senate. I’m not sure what powerful means if he’s been in the U.S. Senate over three decades and Kentucky still remains one of the poorest states in the country.
#
I’m going to beat this man. **WE are going to beat this man. **

There’s this narrative that Mitch McConnell is the most “powerful” man in the Senate.
I’m not sure what powerful means if he’s been in the U.S. Senate over three decades and Kentucky still remains one of the poorest states in the country.
****That’s not power. That’s exploitation.****
The only person who’s benefited from Mitch’s power is himself. Even now, in the midst of the COVID-19 crisis, he refuses to lift a finger for the working-class families who are struggling to make ends meet. But he’s okay pushing Trump’s distorted talking points around coronavirus and delaying relief efforts for Americans if it means making his donors happy.
It’s time to elect someone who’s the complete opposite of Mitch McConnell.
Someone who knows what it’s like to not have enough money for dinner. Someone who looks at his community and asks “how can I help?” Someone who isn’t afraid to fight for the right thing even when it isn’t politically convenient.
**[Will you chip in $5 to support our grassroots, progressive movement and send me to D.C.? disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
He's desperate, he's scared, but he's dangerous. We won't let him do any more damage. |
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=625ddee94d&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,

Cory Booker is in BIG Trouble!

Two liberal establishment polls show Cory Booker at just around 50%! When liberal polls are unable to get past 50% with all their game-playing, it's _very_ clear Cory Booker is very vulnerable!

## I will remove this clown from politics for good, and I will continue the Republican Resurgence we started in 2019.

Remember, NJ was supposed to lose every race last year like Virginia and the Kentucky Gubernatorial race. New Jersey broke the national narrative by winning every Republican Battleground competition in the state. I led the state-wide online digital campaign against the Democrats in 2019 and I know what we need to do to win 2020.

We can win up and down the ballot but right now I need your help. If you have time to help, [please sign up here](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=1e1b7b6f19&e=3e017fab0f). _**We need you.**_

If you can spare any amount, now is the time to donate to our campaign. We have massive momentum, and your contribution will determine if we are able to break the 42-year New Jersey U.S. Senate dry spell for Republicans.
---
| [DONATE TO HELP US BEAT BOOKER](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=9b68005999&e=3e017fab0f "DONATE TO HELP US BEAT BOOKER")
---
| With President Trump at the top of the ballot, New Jersey is 100% winnable, but it will be up to you and me to make it happen. I have the message and I have the team, help us get our message out by donating today! Time is of the essence!

---
| [EVERY EFFORT COUNTS — FIGHT BACK NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=31c7d61553&e=3e017fab0f "EVERY EFFORT COUNTS — FIGHT BACK NOW")
---
| The media will try and ignore that New Jersey is a tossup, but the more we raise right _NOW_ , the harder it will be for them to hide the fact.

Look, no one likes Cory Booker. We can remove him — and set the stage to remove Phil Murphy — **_but I need your help to make that happen._**

Thank you for fighting to save New Jersey.

Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: I'm touring salons as they re-open!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Conservative Wall Tours District Barbershops, Nail, and Hair Salons | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d532020d1756/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12453573?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Friday, May 8, 2020
---
| | **Conservative Kathaleen Wall Announces Second "Back In Business" Small Business Tour For Friday, Saturday, and Monday For Openings Of Barbershops, Nail, And Hair Salons**

_Sugar Land Republican Says: “Texans Are Ready To Get Back To Work, And We’re Ready to Start Living Our Lives Again. Let’s Once Again Show Our Support And Our Community Pride For Texas’ Great Small Businesses.”_
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall today announced nail and hair salon campaign stops for Friday, Saturday and Monday in commencement with the continued reopening of Texas’ economy.

Last week Wall launched a four-stop “Back in Business” small business and restaurant tour to kick off the first phase of Gov. Abbott’s reopening, and was immediately attacked by the Texas Democratic Party as embarking on a “Back in Sickness” tour.

“The Texas Democratic Party fights to keep abortion clinics open but nail and hair salons closed. How out of touch is that?” asked Wall. “If those Democratic weaklings want to see real turmoil, just try getting between Texas Republican women and our nail salons. If Governor Abbott says we’re back in business, then I’m going to support these patriotic small business owners and say thank you for their sacrifice.”

“Texans are ready to get back to work, and we’re ready to start living our lives again,” continued Wall. “Let’s once again show our support and our community pride for Texas’ great small businesses.”

Wall’s second small business tour highlights the continued can-do spirit shown by all Texans, Gov. Abbott and President Trump as together we battle the Coronavirus.

**Visit One – Today, Friday, May 8, 10am**
_Herbal Essential Nails Spa_
3348 State Highway 6
Sugar Land, TX 77478

**Visit Two – Tomorrow, Saturday, May 9, 1:30pm**
_Bijou Salon Suites _
_Kathaleen will be joining salon owner and Brazoria County GOP activist Julie Pickren, as well as Brazoria County Young Republicans and City Councilmen_
3348 FM 528 Rd.
Friendswood, TX 77546

**Visit Three – Monday, May 11, 11am**
_Blue Lion Salon Studios_
24551 Katy Fwy.
Katy, TX 77494
###
---
|
---

---

name: John Cornyn
subject: Only 2,457 Slots Left!
body:
Friend, The new Red Texas Defender team that we have instituted has kicked off with a bang. I'm not at all surprised by the number of Texans who have decided to join this select group. But one thing that does surprise me was not seeing your name on the list. I really thought this team would appeal to you. A team of people who want to keep Texas red and are committed to defending our conservative values. body:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fbQKyMx7fQAulLYJpJikJmQB1RGLPoRO72nUDfcUfbw=/LB4mh324lpIS8Tqeyz58PQ-uTbwY_9ON3cu3YaZv3m0=?code=GS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_050720_ACAJA_A%26amount%3D50)

* * *

This week I responded to Donald Trump's outrageous pledge to "**_terminate_** " the Affordable Care Act with a promise to Arizona families to protect our healthcare.

**The middle of a pandemic that has killed thousands of Americans is no time for partisan politics and taking away healthcare from millions of Americans. **

That's why I will continue to fight for commonsense protections for our healthcare in the Affordable Care Act from these senseless cuts by this Administration.

[**Will you add your name to my petition calling on Congress to protect the Affordable Care Act?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fbQKyMx7fQAulLYJpJikJmQB1RGLPoRO72nUDfcUfbw=/LB4mh324lpIS8Tqeyz58PQ-uTbwY_9ON3cu3YaZv3m0=?code=GS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_050720_ACAJA_A%26amount%3D50)

Thank you for for taking action to protect our healthcare,

\-- _Greg_

name: Unemployment Update via Margaret Good for Congress
subject: this is not good, friend.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Instead of deflecting blame and calling for an investigation into a system that was, by Republican design, created to make it as hard as possible to get benefits, Republicans should join Margaret in calling for a special legislative session to actually solve these problems for working families in Florida.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17424113/193748552/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTliNzNkYS01ZDkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec5hJ0jQHcd_OCAb01HTD9owB6k2fPccCUrDw6DycvI=&emci=8d49512c-3891-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=6a9b73da-5d91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Team,

1.1 million Floridians have applied for unemployment since March 15th, and 345,180 of them are still awaiting payment, and hundreds of thousands more have been denied without reason. But our fight for Floridians continues. It’s an uphill and continuous battle, but we are all doing what we can:
* Margaret, along with her Democratic colleagues, called for a special session to deal with this unemployment debacle. We used a procedural move to poll for this special session, but it was voted down on party lines.
* A courageous group of unemployed Floridians filed a class-action lawsuit demanding the benefits they are due, but a judge threw out the lawsuit.
* The attorney representing Governor DeSantis said there is nothing in Florida statutes that guarantees unemployment checks for all applicants.
* Our governor was quoted calling our state's unemployment system a "jalopy" and a "cluster."

_It is disgraceful that Florida’s Republican leadership is leaving hundreds of thousands of Floridians behind—people who have gone weeks without a paycheck through no fault of their own._

**[Instead of deflecting blame and calling for an investigation into a system that was, by Republican design, created to make it as hard as possible to get benefits, Republicans should join Margaret in calling for a special legislative session to actually solve these problems for working families in Florida. Add your name if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17424114/193748553/548889563?contactdata=uKvU1XZewhUZiytLQ8rYf%2FzA0KKM4sSXF1G56u8R97LU8jKdLtQgnfKa0DYhQaQEhCU8Gtd3GpasTKH1in5m7cPmC5N7Ih%2BRDvCZXx9vwtKT%2BMky%2FWquiRK7l2f8e9cIgTQtvQWL8ZO0v6wzXD4dNw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTliNzNkYS01ZDkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec5hJ0jQHcd_OCAb01HTD9owB6k2fPccCUrDw6DycvI=&emci=8d49512c-3891-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=6a9b73da-5d91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

Margaret tried to compel the Florida legislature to hold a special session to deal with this dire consequence of the pandemic, but over and over she ran into GOP obstruction.

The judicial route isn’t the answer, and GOP leadership in Florida will continue to fail us. Last week, we asked you to sign onto our petition for a special session, and so many of you added your name.

**[Margaret fought for a special session to address Florida’s unemployment—but Tallahassee insiders blocked it. Despite not winning this fight, we must continue to demand more for Florida families. Stand with Margaret to demand more from Governor DeSantis by adding your name here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17424115/193748554/548889563?contactdata=uKvU1XZewhUZiytLQ8rYf%2FzA0KKM4sSXF1G56u8R97LU8jKdLtQgnfKa0DYhQaQEhCU8Gtd3GpasTKH1in5m7cPmC5N7Ih%2BRDvCZXx9vwtKT%2BMky%2FWquiRK7l2f8e9cIgTQtvQWL8ZO0v6wzXD4dNw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTliNzNkYS01ZDkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec5hJ0jQHcd_OCAb01HTD9owB6k2fPccCUrDw6DycvI=&emci=8d49512c-3891-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=6a9b73da-5d91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

Thank you for being with us on this,

Team Good

| [Sign on!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17424116/193748555/548889563?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTliNzNkYS01ZDkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec5hJ0jQHcd_OCAb01HTD9owB6k2fPccCUrDw6DycvI=&emci=8d49512c-3891-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=6a9b73da-5d91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)

name: Ashley Hinson
subject: I’m fighting back for Iowa!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's clear that Pelosi, Finkenauer, and the Democratic establishment are afraid of my campaign. And they should be!
Friend --
My team has been trying to reach you!
At the start of this month, we set an ambitious $10,000 fundraising goal to kick off the start of May, and we are still shy of reaching it with less than 24 hours to go!
_**We must hit the goals we set because Nancy Pelosi announced last month that she has earmarked $2,000,000 for this Iowa congressional race to protect my far left opponent, Abby Finkenauer, in November**_.
It's clear that Pelosi, Finkenauer, and the Democratic establishment are afraid of my campaign. [**And they should be!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jAwLbXeDag0Pp2kbfRXbIgt0Pf3NG0NtKJyX33qAUGC_SC_jX3Sg2t_RqDpnpD6FMps4WTt02vYjnStrpQ-EO_1pYw2x38EMVSqAntv-SlvoDaCU5A3yaY-SUAcdRc4mkF5-pTjb-nI6UyGA603P2pg-avS0dOOh7Evss1cHHWzz0UuHH29J31ntblfpsYmsSSsLmzifSKxwPQOmtED0j4aPcN7qnygHWos9SQm0DkIjKNoqdzmDfUPI3n_F50SaMT9AaHoSogJtt7zmfjrx3GoiZo2qEAcYCFBtZ0PWVYm0FX_d1gAy9j9lJvdxSqgDIpysLmL_0aIrCetDf22EOM8_jgDcvW_HxVpboBIFoKX05Lu7_eqpTzLxKiMjV8ccQlLdvw2LWsM=&c=U9nEgMbPwL3WsFkG2MLW9G0wfUmVLqBAVgCV1NQufc6Dm3W5LT_ZBw==&ch=OA5IryTH1dequUNnF0YJN_N1VRQqU7nfD9OpIAa4zN45SGHNy9VMog==)

clean_body: It's clear that Pelosi, Finkenauer, and the Democratic establishment are afraid of my campaign. And they should be! Friend -- My team has been trying to reach you! At the start of this month, we set an ambitious $10,000 fundraising goal to kick off the start of May, and we are still shy of reaching it with less than 24 hours to go! We must hit the goals we set because Nancy Pelosi announced last month that she has earmarked $2,000,000 for this Iowa congressional race to protect my far left opponent, Abby Finkenauer, in November. It's clear that Pelosi, Finkenauer, and the Democratic establishment are afraid of my campaign. == I'm not like Abby Finkenauer or the other politicians in Washington. I was an award-winning news reporter born right here in Iowa, reporting on what Iowans needed to hear to keep their families safe and informed. But, I knew that I could do more for my community. That's why, in 2016, I ran to represent my district in the State House and became the first woman ever to win a traditionally Democrat House seat as a Republican. Now, I'm running against == Friend, I need your help to take back this seat from the far left! == == == == == == == Thank you, Ashley Hinson == == PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302

body:
This petition is extremely important.

| SUPPORTER: Peter Willis | SIGNATURE ID: #105671024 **3,500 SIGNATURES REQUIRED:**
[**Sign this huge petition and demand an END to bailouts for Big Corporations instead of families and workers! >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17424404/193755367/-107095577?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MmI2NTFhLTYwOTEtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ZqatnCcLoWvftkPkOLKz7JWEkQSDnE1gcl6PB-AsiY=&emci=9b814cda-d890-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=782b651a-6091-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036) | [YES, I'LL SIGN TO SAY "NO MORE CORPORATE BAILOUTS!" »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17424405/193755368/-107095577?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MmI2NTFhLTYwOTEtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ZqatnCcLoWvftkPkOLKz7JWEkQSDnE1gcl6PB-AsiY=&emci=9b814cda-d890-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=782b651a-6091-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036)
---
* * *
Peter -- We've absolutely had enough.

[**In the first COVID-19 Relief Package, Republicans DEMANDED massive bailouts for Big Corporations...**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17424406/193755369/-107095577?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MmI2NTFhLTYwOTEtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ZqatnCcLoWvftkPkOLKz7JWEkQSDnE1gcl6PB-AsiY=&emci=9b814cda-d890-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=782b651a-6091-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036)

But they only gave working Americans a paltry $1,200 stimulus payment to last for 10 weeks!

In fact, Trump's Treasury Secretary, Steven Mnuchin, just gave the _deathblow_ to any hope of holding corporations accountable for bailouts they receive:

subject: Defending the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
President Trump is threatening to deny the United States Postal Service the funding it needs to stay operational.
**Let 's get one thing straight: The USPS is _central_ to our democracy -- _especially_ right now. **Due to COVID-19, November's election will likely see a higher number of people voting by mail than ever before. Therefore, it's _imperative_ we have a functioning postal service so ballots are delivered and counted.
**That 's why Linda is demanding the Trump Administration supply the USPS with the funding it needs to stay afloat. [Will you show your support for the USPS by signing your name?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ka-KjTuqQvIfIfEmql4BYUN9iOHCkLqpwoUxovKK84I=/3cmgIgI8qT5ub1oaNXScz9R1dMcjWo8QR4BiiOFYUtU=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ka-KjTuqQvIfIfEmql4BYUN9iOHCkLqpwoUxovKK84I=/3cmgIgI8qT5ub1oaNXScz9R1dMcjWo8QR4BiiOFYUtU=)
While President Trump described the USPS as "a joke," Linda knows our national postal service is no laughing matter. It processes around 182 million mail items _every single day_. Its existence _predates our constitution_.
[**If you believe the Trump Administration should grant the USPS the funding it needs, SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ka-KjTuqQvIfIfEmql4BYUN9iOHCkLqpwoUxovKK84I=/3cmgIgI8qT5ub1oaNXScz9R1dMcjWo8QR4BiiOFYUtU=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ka-KjTuqQvIfIfEmql4BYUN9iOHCkLqpwoUxovKK84I=/3cmgIgI8qT5ub1oaNXScz9R1dMcjWo8QR4BiiOFYUtU=)
Thank you for taking action,
\--_Team S anchez_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ka-KjTuqQvIfIfEmql4BYUN9iOHCkLqpwoUxovKK84I=/8TugssLYEkV9orT6Tbt4pXfeRYMnTW9NoVUk-R0WcWM=)

Paid for by Stand with Sánchez

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Why this special election is so important >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

I hope you and your loved ones are safe and well during this time.

There's a key special election coming up in California on May 12th, and I'm happy to support Christy Smith in her race to win this seat.

Christy has been an effective public servant from the school board to the CA Assembly, and we need leaders like her in Congress now more than ever.

**[Help Christy protect this "toss-up" seat! She is working to raise $1 million online by her special election on May 12th -- can you help her get there?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf8/29776869/a6fb8c1/569f01b7/2216204555/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfaGlsbGFyeV9ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_hillary_non")**

Americans need leaders who will manage the COVID-19 crisis with the compassion, competence, and respect for science it will take to save lives and revive the economy.

The response to the pandemic we have seen from Donald Trump is a disgrace to our country. And the last thing we want right now is to give him a sense of momentum going into his re-election.

Instead, we need people in Congress who will put their heads down and get to work to come up with the solutions we need to get our country safely through this pandemic and onto the next phase of reopening our schools, businesses, and economies.

**We need proven leaders like Christy Smith -- and I'm ready to see her get to work in Congress right away.**

**[So join me in supporting my friend Christy in the lead up to her special election on May 12th.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf8/29776869/a6fb8c1/569f01b7/2216204555/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfaGlsbGFyeV9ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_hillary_non")**

Thank you for supporting strong women in their quest to run for office and change the world. We need more of them in politics.

\-- Hillary Clinton

[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf8/29776869/a6fb8c1/569f01b7/2216204555/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfaGlsbGFyeV9ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_hillary_non")
_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf8/29776869/a6fb8c1/569f01b0/2216204555/VEsC/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf8/29776869/a6fb8c1/569f01b1/2216204555/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf8/29776869/a6fb8c1/569f01b2/2216204555/VEsA/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

clean_body: | | | Peter, I have some exciting news: I just endorsed Samelys López for Congress to represent New York’s 15th district. The future of our democracy is at stake, and we need to elect working-class fighters with integrity like Samelys López to Congress. We need to support candidates with the political courage to take on the corporate and real estate interests that have corrupted our democracy. This is why I’ve endorsed working-class champions like AOC, Tiffany Cabán and Samelys to continue the movement that Bernie built and make sure our democracy works for all of us — not just the elite few. This congressional seat is wide-open. The incumbent is not seeking re-election and so we have a real shot at electing a progressive leader who understands the struggles of our communities. The South Bronx is the center of the COVID-19 crisis — and Samelys’ campaign has been organizing mutual aid efforts across the district. That is the kind of leader Samelys will be in congress, she will always center her community. Samelys’ primary election is approaching quickly, it’s on June 23rd. Their campaign needs the resources to reach as many voters as possible across the 15th district and win! If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Samelys’ platform addresses the pain the working-class has suffered at the hands of corporate and real estate elites. In moments of crisis, we need a leader that stands unapologetically for working people and against big money. And that leader is Samelys. Samelys is committed to getting big money and corporate money out of our political system and she’s pledged to support legislation on the federal level to create a public-financing matching program for our federal elections. But, she needs your help to get elected. Samelys is running a grassroots campaign and is rejecting all corporate PAC contributions. Thank you for your commitment to our movement, Zephyr Teachout

subject: Ballots Going Out Today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
# Today's The Day
Election season is officially underway. Montana's first all mail primary begins as Absentee Ballots are sent out today to all registered voters across the state.

Ballots should be arriving in mailboxes as early as tomorrow or Monday.

Please do two things:

1) Vote Troy Downing for State Auditor
2) Return your Absentee Ballot

If you have any questions or do not receive your ballot by the middle of next week please visit the Secretary of States website (Link Provided Below) or contact us directly at info@troydowning.com
---
| [MyVoterPage](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=ec548e9123&e=a212bb87cc "MyVoterPage")
---
| Clearly, this election cycle has been different but it hasn't stopped Team Downing from fighting for Montana and helping our neighbors and friends.

Check out how Troy has led from the front since the beginning of this outbreak.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=5274455fc5&e=a212bb87cc "DONATE NOW")
---
| [ ](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=17cc248992&e=a212bb87cc)
---
Did you catch Troy on Fox News with Dana Perino? Watch Here
| [ ](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=c679fe197d&e=a212bb87cc)
---
Want to learn more about Troy? Check out his interview with Entrepreneur Weekly.
|
---
| Dropping off hand sanitizer to Senator Daines
---
|
---
| Wildrye Hand Sanitizer being shipped to Malstrom Air Force Base
---
|
---
| Troy helped distribute tens of thousands of pounds of food and sanitizer, free, to anyone who was in need or want.
---
|
---
| Hand Sanitizer shipment to the Army
---
|
---
| Wildrye donated 125 bottles and 7 gallons of refills of Hand Sanitizer for the Marias Medical Center, the Toole County Sheriff, and the Mayors office to help them protect their front lines and their community.
---

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **-May 8, 2020-** **-Thirteen days left to apply to vote by mail-** **** Over 200,000 Hoosiers have applied to vote by mail. 59% of those applications were for Democratic ballots, and we aren't done yet. If you haven't applied to vote by mail yet, we've got you covered. **Here are the three ways to apply:**
1. Fill out your application online at **_[indianavoters.in.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17425180/193771977/-1499154792?emci=9da1f95d-648a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=4925535&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWMxNjE4NS02NjkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1xD9Y5D4DvvzdDpLZECYMtaFYQn0xX7Cl5od0u_KwI=)_**
2. Download the form to mail it in **_[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17425181/193771978/1601583050?id=14529&emci=9da1f95d-648a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=4925535&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWMxNjE4NS02NjkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1xD9Y5D4DvvzdDpLZECYMtaFYQn0xX7Cl5od0u_KwI=)_**.
3. Call the Election Division to request an application: (317) 232-3939

**If you're looking for detailed instructions on how to apply, we have the resources to help: ** Read our short _[**blog post**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17425183/193771979/-893062011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWMxNjE4NS02NjkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1xD9Y5D4DvvzdDpLZECYMtaFYQn0xX7Cl5od0u_KwI=&emci=137509ea-3a91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=81c16185-6691-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_ on everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary. Watch our **_[40-second video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17425185/193771981/-803653937?v=kFqDNuHk3ms&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWMxNjE4NS02NjkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1xD9Y5D4DvvzdDpLZECYMtaFYQn0xX7Cl5od0u_KwI=&emci=137509ea-3a91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=81c16185-6691-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_** on how to apply to vote by mail online. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | -May 8, 2020- -Thirteen days left to apply to vote by mail- ** Over 200,000 Hoosiers have applied to vote by mail. 59% of those applications were for Democratic ballots, and we aren't done yet. If you haven't applied to vote by mail yet, we've got you covered. Here are the three ways to apply: 1. Fill out your application online at = 2. Download the form to mail it in =. 3. Call the Election Division to request an application: (317) 232-3939 If you're looking for detailed instructions on how to apply, we have the resources to help: Read our short on everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary. Watch our on how to apply to vote by mail online. Watch our video on how to fill out a mail-in application to vote by mail =. Or check out the Vote-by-Mail Flowchart in or . Vote-by-mail outreach is funded by our 100%-grassroots backed,=. You can help us make sure every Hoosier has the tools to vote by mail =. - Democrat, Linda Lawson, files to be Lieutenant Governor- Former State Representative Linda Lawson has officially filed to be the Party’s nominee for Lieutenant Governor. The Indiana Democratic Party issued the following statement on her filing: “Linda Lawson is a fighter. In law enforcement and at the Statehouse, she was a trailblazer and a steadfast advocate on issues like pay equity and for victims of domestic violence. Lawson brings a knowledge of the Statehouse that is second to none. In Rep. Lawson, Woody Myers gains an experienced lawmaker and a partner ready to lead on day one." -Holcomb trades in Hoosier lives- On April 22, Indiana was projected to lose 971 Hoosiers to COVID-19 by August 4. Then Gov. Holcomb decided to reopen the economy, and that number . That's a 543% increase in deaths. Holcomb's decision to lift regulations rapidly is projected to cross out the equivalent of an entire town. It's roughly equivalent to the entire population of Cicero. The Governor has chosen one of the most aggressive reopening plans in the country. Still, he has built one of the least successful responses to date. Indiana saw it's second-highest, on Wednesday. There is in place. Indiana still put in place by experts. And we have a than neighboring states. Gov. Holcomb is playing Russian roulette with Hoosiers' lives. We're joining the collection of and that have asked Holcomb to put Hoosiers lives first and postpone reopening. We can't stand by and let him put lives on the line. Will you help us fight to save Hoosiers' lives by ? -Gov. Holcomb in a pandemic: non-essential travel, ignoring social distancing, going maskless in restaurants- It's been clear that Gov. Holcomb isn't taking the pandemic seriously. But last weekend, he showed us #NextLevel carelessness. Holcomb took a and was spotted maskless in a restaurant taking selfies with guests. A month ago, Brown County officials to shut down state parks to stop non-essential travel to their county and keep residents safe. Now, Holcomb is vacationing there and ignoring nearly every public health measure designed to stop the spread. Hoosiers have made countless sacrifices to keep each other safe. Our governor won't do the same. -Resources- You have 13 DAYS to apply to vote by mail in the June 2 primary. Apply by May 21 online . Still have questions on voting in the 2020 primary? Read our short on everything you need to know. Need a hand applying to vote by mail? Check out the for deadlines and instructions on registering to vote, applying to vote by mail, and mailing in your ballot. Watch our on how to apply to vote by mail online. body:
I’m excited to introduce myself as Georgette's new Deputy Campaign Manager. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17425315/193775500/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjZkNzlkYy02NzkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BRhI9OUXs-dIzoLiRLJkEzSNYsh4bX9zq1ouXaflfvA=&emci=deeb66d6-6791-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8b6d79dc-6791-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Hello friend.

I’m Alex, and I’m excited to introduce myself as Georgette's new Deputy Campaign Manager.

I’ve been working with Georgette closely over the last couple of weeks, and it's been remarkable to see her passion for service up close.

She's laser focused on guiding San Diego through the COVID-19 crisis. But she also has some bold ideas for how we can use this opportunity to reinvest in our future like never before. It’s a difficult time, but I'm excited to be on this team.

**I’m reaching out today to make sure you saw the news that we formed a National Finance Committee to help our campaign raise the resources we need to win.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17425316/193775501/1147193815?refcode=em-200508-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjZkNzlkYy02NzkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BRhI9OUXs-dIzoLiRLJkEzSNYsh4bX9zq1ouXaflfvA=)
Some of our leading co-chairs include State Senate President Toni Atkins, former San Francisco Mayor Willie Brown, and former State Senator Chris Kehoe.

Running against an ultra-wealthy self-funder is no easy task, and the success of this committee is going to depend on your continued support too, friend.

**So to kick things off on strong footing we set a goal of raising $15,000 before the end of the week:**

**[Can I count on you to add a donation to our campaign today? It’s not about how much you give -- it's about chipping in to say that you're with us in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17425317/193775502/1147193815?refcode=em-200508-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjZkNzlkYy02NzkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BRhI9OUXs-dIzoLiRLJkEzSNYsh4bX9zq1ouXaflfvA=)**

Thanks so much,

Alex Obolensky
Deputy Campaign Manager
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200508-all-b)**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: an end-of-week update on my work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/vx8V1dxZ9wqqJHa2PNfX2YfBil8u6v-ZNyuxPyH5XTg=?refcode=AS5.8)
---
| Dear Peter, I hope you are safe and doing OK during this challenging time. I wanted to provide some updates on what I've been working over the past few weeks. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/33lCgTr2vMgbWxG1XfpmnUyNApI5Go-PV6rB7J3sqBc=) [_**Broadband Expansion**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/33lCgTr2vMgbWxG1XfpmnUyNApI5Go-PV6rB7J3sqBc=) The COVID-19 pandemic is making clear what VA-07 has always known - **the digital divide that exists across our communities is detrimental to our economy, our healthcare system, and our schools.** Business owners, families, and students in rural areas, including those in our district, need to have reliable high-speed internet access. That's why **I lead a bipartisan effort** of more than 70 Representatives from across the country **calling for a historic investment in and commitment to expanding our nation 's broadband infrastructure.** I am proud that Republicans and Democrats have joined me in this effort because this issue is one of opportunity and fairness, not partisanship. [_**Listen to my interview on NPR 's 1A.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/33lCgTr2vMgbWxG1XfpmnUyNApI5Go-PV6rB7J3sqBc=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/06GZ8dfYz6CQc6ZPkUZKjJ71aEkzDQgzpgKC1dghcz8=) [_**Virtual Kids Town Hall**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/06GZ8dfYz6CQc6ZPkUZKjJ71aEkzDQgzpgKC1dghcz8=) **In addition to the telephone town hall I held earlier this week, last week, I hosted a virtual town hall** to hear directly from my younger constituents -- the children of Central Virginia. Kids are affected by this crisis, too, and I admired the thoughtful questions they brought. My message to them: **Yes, this virus is serious, but our community is working together and thinking creatively to address it.** Everyone at all ages can take action to protect each other, such as washing hands, wearing protective masks, and keeping a safe distance from friends and neighbors. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/H8tDfsThJiu2b5rEoIL2D1M3eoAsBfqFTelRUGtDM8s=) [_**Clearer information from the IRS**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/H8tDfsThJiu2b5rEoIL2D1M3eoAsBfqFTelRUGtDM8s=) **Central Virginia taxpayers have real questions and concerns about economic impact payments, and they deserve clear information and guidance.** Although the coronavirus pandemic started nearly two months ago, the IRS has not yet instituted full-scale teleworking operations for its customer service representatives. Without a customer service team ready to go, many of our neighbors are having trouble learning the current status of their payments. That's why **I 'm leading a multi-member effort calling on the IRS to explain its lack of telework capabilities.** We are also calling on them to share information with Congress about any obstacles it's facing in expanding telework capabilities. We need to know any difficulties they are facing so that we can help find a solution and finally deliver up-to-date answers to the American people. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/ucYzh1iknpa510YM4no0yGZNa8hBiiz5sKFcTJHUDCQ=) [_**China**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/ucYzh1iknpa510YM4no0yGZNa8hBiiz5sKFcTJHUDCQ=) Earlier this week I addressed the state of our country's coronavirus response and the pressing need for U.S. global leadership during this unprecedented crisis. Unfortunately, **the United States is abandoning our leadership role in this pandemic,** which both threatens our national security and weakens our ability to respond to future threats. If we continue to cede ground and abandon our historical leadership, other nations, like China, will seek to fill the void. As we emerge from this crisis, **we must take precise action to reaffirm U.S. global leadership and strengthen our relationships with our global partners.** Please make sure you're following my [_**Facebook**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/B9c5FOmqgf17_bNDXu1pV8U8aUSBm9AsStngK4Ex-Zc=) and [_**Twitter**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/PDD13RbAZ0UFne6eUtlq7Ylf9JlYLkrzGoK5tydSPto=) pages -- that's where **I 'll keep in contact and share the most up-to-date information.** If you would like to join our campaign efforts, please visit _**[AbigailSpanberger.com.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/OGAt1HoMC8I1uVPkmkN9KVOkGdFXD0gcFufUTJgxC4c=)**_
---
I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy, _Abigail_

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/vx8V1dxZ9wqqJHa2PNfX2YfBil8u6v-ZNyuxPyH5XTg=?refcode=AS5.8) | | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/vx8V1dxZ9wqqJHa2PNfX2YfBil8u6v-ZNyuxPyH5XTg=?refcode=AS5.8)
---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/ZlpP2Y6pOQegBsv7Mkpx-YzWDEeJGhR-PbiIQ9Qb27s=).

If you wish to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/koItAhf_QyZ3mUuo21J1k4YKUxGG7lzFpQNvjt1cJAU=). [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/rjpHVqfea7fzaElWcWlKDruhKbB3nWhSCW-88CcepRk=/YpxVFPdRFg957L8xGotZp9MzaU7bbpVSNpnoeh9AQNM=)
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Susan Collins
subject: I need your help by midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Chuck Schumer is at it again. He just placed another six figure ad buy to spread lies about me across the airwaves in Maine. The attacks from Chuck Schumer and the Far Left are so intense and frequent that my Urgent Response Fund has nearly run out. Right now, we don't have the necessary funds to fight back and set the record straight. That is why I am reaching out to you today. I need your help.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTYwODAS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDc2NDUwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In order to fight back against these new attacks, I need to activate **97 new donors** for my Urgent Response Fund before **midnight tonight.** My campaign has limited time to fight back, so it is absolutely critical that we get 97 new donors by midnight.
