name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: Protect Voters and Poll Workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp-long-%20fo%20newsletter.jpg]
Dear Peter ,
Today is the first day in Tennessee to request an absentee ballot for the August primary election.
Heavy laden with restrictions, Tennessee’s absentee voting law prevents most voters from requesting an absentee ballot. For weeks, Tennesseans have asked Secretary of State Tre Hargett to publicly address the possibility of easing these restrictions. The requests for comment came from the press, voters, and the Tennessee State Senate Democratic Caucus members, who co-signed a letter to both Governor Bill Lee and Secretary of State Hargett demanding the safety of voters' and poll workers be protected during the COVID-19 crisis. (Read the Letter) [https://medium.com/@TNSenateDems/democrats-urge-gov-lee-election-officials-to-make-voter-health-a-priority-a3f15305ff67] . For weeks, Secretary of State Hargett and Gov. Lee have been conspicuously silent.
Today, Hargett announced on social media that any “Tennessean 60 or older can submit a request to vote absentee by-mail in the August 6th State and Federal Primary and County General Election.”
That’s it. That’s all he said.
To promote absentee voting without addressing the elephant in the room (PANDEMIC!) shows 1) lack of leadership and 2) a deep understanding of how to suppress the vote.
Republicans, like Hargett, are unleashing one of the greatest voter suppression tactics this country has ever seen by refusing to prioritize voter safety. Trump himself told us why they’re so committed to making it harder to access the ballot box: Republicans are afraid they’ll “never” win another election if they let more people vote. [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2020/mar/30/trump-republican-party-voting-reform-coronavirus]
Expanding absentee voting to make it universal - anyone can request an absentee ballot - is a no brainer during a deadly health crisis. In fact, almost every other state with the same laws have already eased restrictions. Not Tennessee.
So, thank you Charlane Oliver and the Equity Alliance of Nashville [https://theequityalliance.org/] , Kendra Lee and the A. Philip Randolph Institute of Memphis [https://uwmidsouth.galaxydigital.com/agency/detail/?agency_id=77665] , and Gloria Sweet-Love of the State Chapter of the NAACP [https://www.tnnaacp.org/index.html] for leading the coalition of Tennessee nonprofits who sued the state to expand access to absentee voting and mail-in ballots during the COVID-19.
“Tennessee voters should not be forced to choose between their own personal safety and participating in our democratic process," Ms. Oliver said in a statement. "We are in unprecedented circumstances that call for state officials to implement safer and secure approaches to ensure democracy is preserved in the Volunteer State.” - via a story in the Tennessean [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/2020/05/02/tennessee-groups-sue-expand-absentee-voting-amid-covid-19-pandemic/3071613001/]
Governor Lee and Secretary of State Hargett can make this lawsuit go away if they would simply put partisanship aside and work with Democrats to thoughtfully and effectively expand absentee voting, increase early polling time and locations, and create a system for health certifications of each polling site. If they don’t, we can only draw one conclusion - they want to suppress the vote and rig the election.
No person should ever have to choose between their safety and the wellbeing of their family or casting their vote. Please join the fight against this voter suppression by signing our petition for safe voting. [https://tndp.org/petition-tennessee-pass-vote-mail-now/]
We’re in this fight for democracy together,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
GOV. BILL LEE'S VOUCHER PLAN IS
UNCONSTITUTIONAL; DEMS STEP UP TO
FIX STUDENT FUNDING
Earlier this year Bill Lee knew his voucher program was illegal, yet, he still wasted taxpayer dollars pushing it through the state legislature. This week, a judge ruled that the program violated the Tennessee Constitution [https://www.timesfreepress.com/news/politics/story/2020/may/06/reversal-lee-says-state-no-longer-implementing-vouchers/522382/] . Meanwhile, the House Democratic Caucus and Senate Democratic Caucus announced a plan to fix BEP funding with a $1.5 Billion increase to address three main issues:
*
Boosting
teacher
pay

*
Increasing
the
number
of
nurses
and
social
workers
in
schools

*
Updating
student-to-staff
ratios

SIGN YOUR NAME TO DEMAND
UNIVERSAL ABSENTEE VOTING
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/whenweallvote.png]
"Action to safeguard our electoral system cannot wait. In a matter of weeks, millions of Americans across several states will be asked to vote in municipal and primary elections, and they deserve better than the impossible choice between preserving their well-being and casting their ballots." - TNDP chair, Mary Mancini
The above is from a letter from DNC state party chairs urging election commissions and governments to adopt legislation to expand voter health and safety. Read the full letter. [https://www.krwg.org/post/national-push-vote-mail-system-november?fbclid=IwAR1m4cv575a1MXPT6S5NbM7psBSzfAA-dP9NV9vwdb4Kuy4AsGE81ut60_w&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6300233]
No Tennessean should ever have to choose between protecting their family or casting their vote. The Tennessee General Assembly had six different opportunities to pass legislation to protect voters before they recessed last month. The Republican supermajority voted everything down. The Center for Disease Control (CDC) has emphatically stressed social distancing and staying away from crowds of ten or more. Polling places are in direct conflict with CDC recommendations and force voters to choose between staying safe or casting their vote. Tennessee Secretary of State Tre Hargett, Governor Bill Lee, and President Donald Trump must create universal absentee voting. Sign the petition now! [https://tndp.org/universal-ballot-petition/]
CONVERSATIONS AND QUESTIONS:
VIRGINIA COUCH
TN HOUSE DISTRICT 18
https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/619140462279066/ [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/619140462279066/]
Join Virginia’s Campaign! [https://www.votevirginiacouch.com/?fbclid=IwAR3Nk9ZtguLYNoWuwy4ZU_slyN0S4KfVpiF8Wu_NI5UzpXA-TaVvgPvCc-Q] This week we sat down with Virginia Couch, candidate for TN House District 18. Hear first hand the issues Virginia plans to tackle in office and why she decided to run. Watch the video! [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/619140462279066/]
Conversations and Questions, a weekly happy hour, happens every Thursday at 4:00 pm CT/ 5:00 pm ET on Facebook live. Each week we sit down with Democratic candidates on the 2020 ballot to discuss current issues, their platform, and their campaigns.
TNDP TRAINING HUB
We have the opportunity in 2020 to present ourselves and our candidates to voters who are looking for an alternative to the corrupt and inept Republican Party.
Digital organizing and digital voter engagement is more crucial than ever during this crisis and we must operate as if it will not be completely over by August or November.
That's why we created a the TNDP Training Hub to serve as your one stop shop for trainings and skill building. [https://tndp.org/tndp-training-hub/]
The TNDP Hub provides county parties, candidates, and campaigns a list of training opportunities from the TNDP, DNC, National Democratic Training Committee (NDTC) and other orgs that covers digital organizing, campaign planning, communications, field & volunteer recruitment, fundraising, and training the trainer.

TWEETS OF THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-05-01%20at%201.53.11%20PM.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-05-08%20at%203.09.28%20PM.png]
YOUR CONTRIBUTIONS IN ACTION
In the face of the pandemic, Democrats are leading the charge to save and protect Tennesseeans. Before they were elected though, they had to be recruited and trained through the Democratic Party. Any contribution you give today, will help us strengthen our pipeline of candidates and ensure we have effective campaigns running.
Will you consider donating today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2?emci=b02d41f8-b86a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Mike
subject: Associated Press: GOP Hopeful in Crucial US House Race Skips 1st Radio Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | GOP Hopeful in Crucial US House Race Skips 1st Radio Debate Associated Press Russell Contreras May 8, 2020 [https://www.usnews.com/news/best-states/new-mexico/articles/2020-05-07/tea-party-super-pac-calls-gop-us-house-hopeful-a-liberal](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_I6AFGKGdsJGtsVupe9vDcpCVwaiGvkdhggvAOPfJ3RfmSy8J9nqRev9CMwHSZHwKoUSG1E8z0tKwIgQ-lshjna_laEOAC3Ndko80SAE_1CwIf6AQNu7hiS9uuzhvjp4jRZu4U3PEUP1JAFM0QKu2l6Wn0Tvx5WVkI6180f62bgBE8T7PBG9lWzK5TNRIC2FTY6fk-AsuGgiGDbunZCD4tsbMwxirdlEIswzDJUW70VAOlCcytZHmHGjG9eDa6j6Cii9UmDsrkXtHLMdSOAwAuF73W_Tj0H8j6fEdp7NliY=&c=BmUwpsdFSmUosKWYpOCf-N0PSGcNGzzJnjz9zKiYvMJzwPhb39GFcg==&ch=HuE-b06syBShycOazVHVT-nYEFS8Wk7WjYW_WWCxkibF8e2fLJ0C6w==)

RIO RANCHO, N.M. (AP) -- The first major debate among GOP hopefuls in a crucial U.S. House race in [New Mexico](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_I6AFGKGdsJGtsVupe9vDcpCVwaiGvkdhggvAOPfJ3RfmSy8J9nqRev9CMwHSZHwVfxrVm1KJQH1iPglzmNhUZizsyXc4yUC8g5FbAtfY_HqCBG6GPasdkDncoQRePzZkSu0dO-C_MltGcHrkqydvT98f0R26rdPQ4d4Mufp9hS7wicDrSekOQ==&c=BmUwpsdFSmUosKWYpOCf-N0PSGcNGzzJnjz9zKiYvMJzwPhb39GFcg==&ch=HuE-b06syBShycOazVHVT-nYEFS8Wk7WjYW_WWCxkibF8e2fLJ0C6w==) had a noticeable absence -- a Republican who skipped debates in 2018 and lost the seat.
Former state lawmaker Yvette Herrell declined Thursday to participate in the debate with two of her opponents on KIVA in Albuquerque. It was the first radio debate in an increasingly nasty Republican primary fight.
The winner of the primary gets to challenge Democratic U.S. Rep. Xochitl Torres Small of Las Cruces.
In a statement, Herrel said she skipped the debate because host Eddy Aragon had "endorsed against her."
Aragon said he had endorsed oil executive Claire Chase in the race -- and makes endorsements in many GOP primary contests -- but always allows candidates equal time on the station.
Las Cruces businessman Chris Mathys also is vying for the GOP nomination and participated in the debate with Chase.
Herrell lost to Torres Small in 2018 by less than 3,000 votes. She faced criticism for refusing to participate in televised debates.
The Herrell campaign said she would participate in a KRWG TV/FM debate Tuesday and much smaller events hosted by county Republican groups with no journalists. Her campaign had previously challenged opponents to three television and three radio debates.
The first debate came days after The Associated Press reported that Herrell exchanged text messages with a conservative provocateur cartoonist seeking to create a meme about Chase's first marriage. Retired U.S. Marine Jared Richardson also told The AP that Herrell had called him to spread false rumors about Chase's first marriage.
Herrell denied she was spreading rumors about the topic.
Her opponents said they weren't surprised that Herrell avoided the first debate.
"This is how Yvette Herrell ran her campaign when she lost to Torres Small," Mathys said. "The voters of southern New Mexico deserve to hear directly from the candidates who wish to represent them."
Chase campaign manager Mike Berg said Herrell is afraid to answer direct questions about her previous tepid support of President Donald Trump and her connection to the cartoonist.
"Yvette Herrell is continuing her pattern of ducking debates, just like when she lost in 2018," Berg said.
---
| ###
---
| [ClaireChase.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_I6AFGKGdsJGtsVupe9vDcpCVwaiGvkdhggvAOPfJ3RfmSy8J9nqRaMn0K1Xik6AneQmokGT82LYfWcIQVaIKxiSTbPadr0x8vPabUuK4hyRqyFvI6E7tc6lqO27n6TG-O_fUUv-Dy5-2JAD44sPaw==&c=BmUwpsdFSmUosKWYpOCf-N0PSGcNGzzJnjz9zKiYvMJzwPhb39GFcg==&ch=HuE-b06syBShycOazVHVT-nYEFS8Wk7WjYW_WWCxkibF8e2fLJ0C6w==)

name: Team Eugene
subject: This can’t stand

We just got word of a dark-money PAC here in Pennsylvania with one goal: To spread vicious attacks about Eugene in an effort to influence this election.

They’re willing to pour money into our district and spread attacks because they know they can’t hold a candle to Eugene’s proven track record. _It’s shameful, and it can’t stand._

[**Will you chip in any amount to take on Washington special interests and their radical agenda?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17425573/193785082/460726911?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2020.05.08_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=b7dc4846-6b91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2RjNDg0Ni02YjkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IyElraVI9M9AxT43gaJlFdnV5AkD-3fjqUAQ_ow-XqI=)

subject: Adam Kinzinger's danerous response to COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
Even as Illinois and the 16th district see a daily increase in cases, Adam Kinzinger continues his calls to put workers in harm's way. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3be5ad8eae7b/adam-kinzingers-danerous-response-to-covid-19?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
|
> | | | | _At a time when a lot of Americans are dealing with economic uncertainty, we completely understand if you cannot afford to donate right now. Stay safe. Let's get through this together_
> ---
| |
#
Even as the number of COVID-19 cases continues to rise every single day in Illinois, Adam Kinzinger has called for a dangerous and irresponsible re-opening plan that would put thousands of workers at risk. **Adam's plans and policies are a slap in the face to public health officials and workers everywhere,** and the people of IL-16 deserve better reprsentation.

---
| [Chip in to give IL-16 the representation they deserve](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=af27b1ca8f&e=140a9b81e7 "Chip in to give IL-16 the representation they deserve")
---
| When Adam joined with his Republican friends in their calls to put workers at risk,[ I was quick to call him out](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=545ea55291&e=140a9b81e7). Our district has seen multiple hot spots for outbreaks, and we don't have anywhere near the proper testing in place to begin to open bars, restaurants, and theaters. Instead of standing up for the people of his district, **Adam Kinzinger would rather stand up for Trump and his billionaire friends. **

Winning our race in IL-16 in November will be crucial to expanding the Democratic majority in the House. We need fewer Adam Kinzingers in Congress, and**we need more leaders who will listen to our public health officials. Can I count on you to make a contribution today?**

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress in IL-16

body:
Flipping the Senate is about electing senators who'll fight for the people, not special interests.

|
---

---
Hey Peter, we wanted to make sure you had the chance to pitch in toward our new Flip the Senate Fund. Flipping the Senate is the only way to protect health care, make progress on gun safety legislation, and make sure that our government is working for you -- not special interests. That's why we put together our Flip the Senate Fund.

**Let 's show Sen. Cornyn just how strong our grassroots team is -- can you chip in just $1 today to help MJ flip the Senate?**

body:

We MUST hold Arizona if we're going to stop Chuck Schumer's liberal agenda of open borders, Green Bad Deal, and Socialist policies. **Arizona and America deserve better.**

What's worse is that Democrats only need to flip FOUR seats to put Schumer in change. Arizona is at the top of their wish list. [**Defend the Republican Senate Majority today and pitch in $35, $50, $75 or ANY amount! >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W5IbGOARerndPb406Hb5fnmCF_oIz3Z3dRudVZ-kW9kI_Fsq9OigItjNpNbyzV3yhXqC4ffN7FzHtuPobUk-IdBBZyYqtzW6_-EaZLiNFzzNZ5L7qjNCR5MQtCx5Dq1k3cLwEBuyZe1Ola5Vjk_81p-Pw06UIzSHlTje5DCJvjH-qEW-C4khQCIQt7JM_hPA00sr0f8x45ZRhzq-ZCQ84d-bFfpr2CnFOIBWxJoLriEwDC8dAaYS17wEi4ntMyn14ucbVea-KAAt4EyU6LEWRMvqQruxSoA8oRK4iMaZbGd3wHYvHtdxALia3cj7qw9sGc7du4fL99w7chMq5Kr-3BsISZJcCYYYxaoicikns4MBZk6nbnoaJRYsmnMI7VloU1aSDHH5ShlH3bgd0inMMu8lVlPIMZwDbMEnaUujLsQ=&c=YrYL8IqbDwWuVFIqYWDB5ixXhzHqRqcJVhL4EYLzvWcShZX9o-UrjA==&ch=4_3h9b59XiHfXvlmK5_kLDraRWEe7xwR_0YrlR-TBMmtHJOtkNEf8g==)

name: Taylor (Team Young)
subject: Our own worst enemy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
If you knew your $5 donation would go directly towards flipping this seat Red, taking back the House for Republicans, defeating Nancy Pelosi's handpicked candidate, and spreading our conservative message -- would you chip in? Congress.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018nkjk0ra9RyKkqlP8RKg-4LPexy94cumRFg0BErVUMd9M9VdGEvJVjTEiU8wLn4N9ZeiKdX3Vsnm24VBP0QWTx4Cr1Yx59fxQF_7Tq1no6R7GVfpw0nBCm5jXFwuCxkscFg-zj18YbYZ-PoZrLJBaLG6ydfOfryU6Co2sIFfOQiAvHIM6nhGs80UYIH_mfAFHS6o2R3s2TasXoEuKhNBaIx9e7LljUkiYfAHhe8LfqRoC0ssWWVk81i2kR4OWeTv_fWluQWQy8Xwclu2SemQRwLjrjpmPRLRLgto0WXxHN4sQWVcRxl3cNXAhF0hyJ6VvDNLSBIPAcnd4OZ8Z2-YBWFdBgCGGsZvq8yc2XtRg67Mv657lduJ4H_8W_lPSpVWchT5DnA9VNY=&c=IEkBwu-_IEw13T_zs9CnOLOENyr5UIR7xgBXTkoOdU_WdNP1YAHhuA==&ch=F3pbUJq3Mrb3whpBQl92dgGK1wHbp5n1vQd6-JrboC_URlQQ8aRx1A==)
---

Friend, we won our Primary, even beating Pelosi's handpicked candidate. But now we have a target on our backs.

The Washington Democrats know just as well as we do that this seat is the key to the Majority -- whoever wins will decide who controls the House. That's why the Democrats are scrambling. That's why they're taking us on with everything they've got -- and that's a lot.

_Our opponent 's lottery millions.
Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets.
The Democrats' dark money machine._

But we have something better, we have the strength of grassroots conservatives behind us. We have you, Friend.

[**If you knew your $5 donation would go directly towards flipping this seat Red, taking back the House for Republicans, defeating Nancy Pelosi 's handpicked candidate, and spreading our conservative message -- would you chip in?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018nkjk0ra9RyKkqlP8RKg-4LPexy94cumRFg0BErVUMd9M9VdGEvJVjTEiU8wLn4N9ZeiKdX3Vsnm24VBP0QWTx4Cr1Yx59fxQF_7Tq1no6R7GVfpw0nBCm5jXFwuCxkscFg-zj18YbYZ-PoZrLJBaLG6ydfOfryU6Co2sIFfOQiAvHIM6nhGs80UYIH_mfAFHS6o2R3s2TasXoEuKhNBaIx9e7LljUkiYfAHhe8LfqRoC0ssWWVk81i2kR4OWeTv_fWluQWQy8Xwclu2SemQRwLjrjpmPRLRLgto0WXxHN4sQWVcRxl3cNXAhF0hyJ6VvDNLSBIPAcnd4OZ8Z2-YBWFdBgCGGsZvq8yc2XtRg67Mv657lduJ4H_8W_lPSpVWchT5DnA9VNY=&c=IEkBwu-_IEw13T_zs9CnOLOENyr5UIR7xgBXTkoOdU_WdNP1YAHhuA==&ch=F3pbUJq3Mrb3whpBQl92dgGK1wHbp5n1vQd6-JrboC_URlQQ8aRx1A==)

Young Kim is running for Congress to fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She's a proud immigrant and conservative woman, who has been targeted by the Washington Democrats...

They spent millions to keep conservative voices out of office in 2018, and are already organizing to spend millions more to do it again.

This is going to be a tough fight to the bitter end. Just 6 months from the finish line, we need to know -- [**do we have you support?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018nkjk0ra9RyKkqlP8RKg-4LPexy94cumRFg0BErVUMd9M9VdGEvJVlo2SInjtQhgUY7wJbx4tP2Qy-63mumlNt8mLCcm8Z_AQJcQrEf1ADxteP4H_XtP5LSUoGCxJM00L4zizWhy3EymVSeNujNKcaZXPO5MNJYgjkIGCon9ARrPULKiRQs-2EKD-u0uc55tR0Df3OmyAjCqSznHwTmTzGhCCDApcx_NK2bC7s7DF4RmpcQqEzyVJnnHicEoa6Z_UVMglFCoSS6GgXLY1QBaGnPJbJtuX-uWS4mSZUtYpUZPpMcTHl5nlmlsTCUox1VuQCncTsDQh6uaTWB3ej0UWa11r_Fg34a3W_wTa6BYzQTfjJJqG3NxoNTQA3OEPCYa5W52qdfSHYY=&c=IEkBwu-_IEw13T_zs9CnOLOENyr5UIR7xgBXTkoOdU_WdNP1YAHhuA==&ch=F3pbUJq3Mrb3whpBQl92dgGK1wHbp5n1vQd6-JrboC_URlQQ8aRx1A==)

Thank you,

Taylor
Team Young

* * *
_
During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. clean_body: If you knew your $5 donation would go directly towards flipping this seat Red, taking back the House for Republicans, defeating Nancy Pelosi's handpicked candidate, and spreading our conservative message -- would you chip in? Congress. == Friend, we won our Primary, even beating Pelosi's handpicked candidate. But now we have a target on our backs. The Washington Democrats know just as well as we do that this seat is the key to the Majority -- whoever wins will decide who controls the House. That's why the Democrats are scrambling. That's why they're taking us on with everything they've got -- and that's a lot. Our opponent 's lottery millions. Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets. The Democrats' dark money machine. But we have something better, we have the strength of grassroots conservatives behind us. We have you, Friend. == Young Kim is running for Congress to fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She's a proud immigrant and conservative woman, who has been targeted by the Washington Democrats... They spent millions to keep conservative voices out of office in 2018, and are already organizing to spend millions more to do it again. This is going to be a tough fight to the bitter end. Just 6 months from the finish line, we need to know -- == Thank you, Taylor Team Young During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --== Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 ==** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X5Mt19HQtEAr30kqIznQuomQoHB6TnobFt3qCi6yXcnEmNWdZg_EibRXtNd5jKXi2JWWGPZdcP0R3uZXnMj0IX_l9oJLONF9fBboUn1wdQaP2j-GjbIcsH9ZmQjwdLwrB9BYwBksr6St5eROLMNmGz9JzYGsvDKw3gd5MriY29R3ztXcsPXx4gcrk0IoXRIEoiBAZhVaeG2nk6pXrBr2S0aC0064CjXz81nDPW3vzWwDzP-3-hJQb-qVsWJAfJgNuru-AVG8wa_lyQfpUu1aeEi0cAVm1WefRlHfHDyaHhMo5TahZpP71G6eziV5pIBbzqnggzo5_4pTfq0xzd4mZq-DrQiIS_cHEprIi0xYZS3WTCLC0ogZnzsR9AhUZX-DS8_JhtvkN1E=&c=19JXGYXEfVEmtrTYxhnfMA6Ri_EH84Rf1D0cJ7Y9NHhXrglq9ZmO5Q==&ch=VPSr4g1wQKESqwYYSHSB8N37Puhi8zGAK5LI2P7AWTFmbHKCjRsTEQ==) **"Photos obtained first by CBS News show Democratic Congressman Harley Rouda spending time at a private beach in Southern California despite order from Governor Gavin Newsom to close some public beaches in the area"**
CBS News, May 4, 2020 \---
**FIRST** Harley Rouda was an outspoken critic of keeping beaches open and called it "reckless." **THEN** he stood right behind Gavin Newsom as Orange County was singled out and our beaches shut down.
**NOW** Harley Rouda is spotted on a private beach enjoying the very thing he supported closing down for others.

While we have been forced to abide by Governor Newsom's shutdown, Democrat Harley Rouda decided the rules don't apply to him. [**
PUT AN END TO HARLEY 'S HYPOCRITICAL POLITICS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X5Mt19HQtEAr30kqIznQuomQoHB6TnobFt3qCi6yXcnEmNWdZg_EibRXtNd5jKXi2JWWGPZdcP0R3uZXnMj0IX_l9oJLONF9fBboUn1wdQaP2j-GjbIcsH9ZmQjwdLwrB9BYwBksr6St5eROLMNmGz9JzYGsvDKw3gd5MriY29R3ztXcsPXx4gcrk0IoXRIEoiBAZhVaeG2nk6pXrBr2S0aC0064CjXz81nDPW3vzWwDzP-3-hJQb-qVsWJAfJgNuru-AVG8wa_lyQfpUu1aeEi0cAVm1WefRlHfHDyaHhMo5TahZpP71G6eziV5pIBbzqnggzo5_4pTfq0xzd4mZq-DrQiIS_cHEprIi0xYZS3WTCLC0ogZnzsR9AhUZX-DS8_JhtvkN1E=&c=19JXGYXEfVEmtrTYxhnfMA6Ri_EH84Rf1D0cJ7Y9NHhXrglq9ZmO5Q==&ch=VPSr4g1wQKESqwYYSHSB8N37Puhi8zGAK5LI2P7AWTFmbHKCjRsTEQ==)
But this isn't the first instance, Harley hasn't done what he's claimed. In fact, Harley Rouda's term in office has been a series of hypocritical actions:

He said he would tackle dark money groups holding our nation hostage -- _but hasn 't rejected the $10.4 million those groups have to spend on his campaign. _He said he doesn't work for special interests -- _but accepted $4.4+ million from Michael Bloomberg and then endorsed his presidential campaign._ He claims to be a moderate -- _but has voted in line with AOC 92% of the time._ [**
PUT AN END TO HARLEY 'S HYPOCRITICAL POLITICS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X5Mt19HQtEAr30kqIznQuomQoHB6TnobFt3qCi6yXcnEmNWdZg_EibRXtNd5jKXi2JWWGPZdcP0R3uZXnMj0IX_l9oJLONF9fBboUn1wdQaP2j-GjbIcsH9ZmQjwdLwrB9BYwBksr6St5eROLMNmGz9JzYGsvDKw3gd5MriY29R3ztXcsPXx4gcrk0IoXRIEoiBAZhVaeG2nk6pXrBr2S0aC0064CjXz81nDPW3vzWwDzP-3-hJQb-qVsWJAfJgNuru-AVG8wa_lyQfpUu1aeEi0cAVm1WefRlHfHDyaHhMo5TahZpP71G6eziV5pIBbzqnggzo5_4pTfq0xzd4mZq-DrQiIS_cHEprIi0xYZS3WTCLC0ogZnzsR9AhUZX-DS8_JhtvkN1E=&c=19JXGYXEfVEmtrTYxhnfMA6Ri_EH84Rf1D0cJ7Y9NHhXrglq9ZmO5Q==&ch=VPSr4g1wQKESqwYYSHSB8N37Puhi8zGAK5LI2P7AWTFmbHKCjRsTEQ==)
This race is being billed as the "Marquee Fight" to watch in November and POLITICO is calling it a toss-up. That means it could go either way -- either 2 more years of Harley's hypocritical leadership or a switch to common-sense reform...

Michelle Steel has dedicated her life to providing quick, common-sense reforms to all Californians. She's pledged to oppose new taxes and tax increases and even led the fight to return millions to California taxpayers. Now she's ready to take that fight to Congress -- but she needs our help! [**
PUT AN END TO HARLEY 'S HYPOCRITICAL POLITICS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X5Mt19HQtEAr30kqIznQuomQoHB6TnobFt3qCi6yXcnEmNWdZg_EibRXtNd5jKXi2JWWGPZdcP0R3uZXnMj0IX_l9oJLONF9fBboUn1wdQaP2j-GjbIcsH9ZmQjwdLwrB9BYwBksr6St5eROLMNmGz9JzYGsvDKw3gd5MriY29R3ztXcsPXx4gcrk0IoXRIEoiBAZhVaeG2nk6pXrBr2S0aC0064CjXz81nDPW3vzWwDzP-3-hJQb-qVsWJAfJgNuru-AVG8wa_lyQfpUu1aeEi0cAVm1WefRlHfHDyaHhMo5TahZpP71G6eziV5pIBbzqnggzo5_4pTfq0xzd4mZq-DrQiIS_cHEprIi0xYZS3WTCLC0ogZnzsR9AhUZX-DS8_JhtvkN1E=&c=19JXGYXEfVEmtrTYxhnfMA6Ri_EH84Rf1D0cJ7Y9NHhXrglq9ZmO5Q==&ch=VPSr4g1wQKESqwYYSHSB8N37Puhi8zGAK5LI2P7AWTFmbHKCjRsTEQ==)
Harley Rouda claims we're all in this together, but there seems to be one set of rules for us and another just for him.

_\-- California Republicans News Alert_ | _With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you 're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help._ [_**ENDORSE MICHELLE STEEL FOR CONGRESS**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X5Mt19HQtEAr30kqIznQuomQoHB6TnobFt3qCi6yXcnEmNWdZg_EibeivoVqFdXCz69qT9IG7FlKC87eTnU-4EoXy6BXIkZlpaTZg1THYTTAdLm2Ii21MIpvXlg5rg5lrbDMUkEyZCtijR5u94gNR_VbUhzUz_imrWfQN6R7M0ZiY6KW1PlL9y8PC5kT0azhPAR9YzWB9FkcK--isrqW1zQKAu19hr7ZS3enILxYgehP6-l8A2vfvS3X0tZLU17F6WKylPnyiW4ZE9NC9h88kAjebi-ZEJhzGIVr5jP8yAQzBvE-_OD9Cn3BPI_SdMEZUQKcbD4jzSQw28af7TX_AAEIr6I8pSzumytFNXhs3Es-BaoslSShnGFSGPnUD4sz&c=19JXGYXEfVEmtrTYxhnfMA6Ri_EH84Rf1D0cJ7Y9NHhXrglq9ZmO5Q==&ch=VPSr4g1wQKESqwYYSHSB8N37Puhi8zGAK5LI2P7AWTFmbHKCjRsTEQ==)

Our campaign has made important innovations to ensure our field organizing efforts remain effective -- and we've seen great success! name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: We must hold China accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marsha for Senate
body:
I hope you will join me in the fight to defend President Trump and hold China accountable.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTY5NDUS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDc3MjI0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
__

I wanted to make sure you didn't miss this -- have you seen my latest video?
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTY5NDUS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDc3MjI0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Since you sent me to the Senate, I've been on the frontlines in calling out China for their human rights violations, infringing on our personal privacy, and use of violence against the Hong Kong freedom fighters. And I'm proud to be a leader in our newest fight -- holding China legally and financially accountable for its role in the Wuhan coronavirus pandemic.

Despite Nancy Pelosi's clear politically-motivated intentions to launch yet another witch hunt into President Trump's handling of the coronavirus crisis, we know who really needs to be held accountable -- **China**. The Democrats' reluctance to blame China and instead point fingers at President Trump only shows how desperate they are. Even in the midst of the ongoing pandemic, they insist on playing partisan games instead of calling out China for their active role in the mishandling and spread of COVID-19.

As Democrats continue their witch hunt, I have been working hard with Senate Republicans to fight for the American people and the small businesses that make our nation great. That fight starts with calling out China and ensuring they are held liable. [_**Watch the video here.**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTY5NDUS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDc3MjI0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

I hope you will join me in the fight to defend President Trump and hold China accountable.

Sincerely,

Marsha Blackburn
U.S. Senator (R-TN)

********
Paid for by Marsha for Senate
---
********

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Marsha for Senate. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Marsha for Senate's online community.

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: HUGE Endorsements, Our New TV 📺 Ad, and more.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e1078dfac7598c9/6b9195d2be39696cc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Citizens United Endorses Corky Messner for U.S. Senate**
Citizens United this week endorsed Republican U.S. Senate candidate Bryant “Corky” Messner.

“With (Corky Messner) on the ticket, @realDonaldTrump will have a great team to help carry New Hampshire this November and retire (Senator Jeanne Shaheen),” tweeted Citizens United President David Bossie, who served as President Trump’s 2016 deputy campaign manager.

Corky also received an endorsement from the Citizens United Political Victory Fund, which tweeted, “It's time to retire liberal career politician Jeanne Shaheen...Proud to endorse Corky Messner for Senate to advance the Trump agenda and defend liberty!”

“I'm thrilled to have the support of Citizens United and the endorsement of staunch conservative and Trump campaign veteran David Bossie,” said Corky. “Like David and Citizens United, I believe our rights as Americans are inalienable, and I will stay vigilant in the fight to defend them.”

“This endorsement sends a strong message that Corky Messner is a true conservative, someone who reflects the views and the values of Granite Staters,” said Messner campaign co-chair Fred Doucette, who co-chaired President Trump’s New Hampshire presidential campaign in 2016 and co-chairs his 2020 campaign. “Corky Messner, Governor Chris Sununu, and President Trump will help New Hampshire return to its conservative roots this November.”
|
---
**In The News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e1078dfac7598c9/35eec4eac82a2615c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
WMUR’s Primary Source announced the launch of our new campaign ad – the first in this primary race.

As Corky notes, “This will serve as an introduction to many Granite Staters, but I’ve already met thousands of voters through campaign events before the COVID-19 pandemic and our tele-town halls and virtual meetings. I look forward to continuing to share with New Hampshire voters my conservative mission and message in the coming months.”
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e1078dfac7598c9/d99cbe1a6c4885e5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
[**View the ad**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e1078dfac7598c9/a4b890625096e3e4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Tea Party Express Supports Corky’s Run for U.S. Senate **
Tea Party Express, the nation's largest Tea Party political action committee, has endorsed Corky Messner’s run for the U.S. Senate.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e1078dfac7598c9/e072aa58b18444a2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

In announcing the group’s support of Corky’s efforts to unseat Democrat U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen, Tea Party Express Co-Founder and Chief Strategist Sal Russo said, “Corky’s passion for service, love for his country, and dedication to the Tea Party principles of limited government, free market solutions, and reducing unsustainable spending and debt are a stark contrast to Senator Shaheen’s left-wing agenda.”

“The support of Tea Party Express builds on our momentum and provides our campaign with an invaluable boost as we continue our efforts to restore conservative values to the U.S. Senate,” said Corky. “Granite Staters share my view that we must restore individual liberties and reject the progressive agenda of Senator Shaheen and her party.”
|
---
**Corky Honors Our Nation’s Nurses**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e1078dfac7598c9/fff8f8954a1bd031c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
This is National Nurses Week (May 6-12), and Corky joins all Americans in expressing his gratitude to these health care heroes. “During this global #COVID19 crisis, my heart goes out to all the tireless nurses in New Hampshire, around the country, and all over the world battling the virus on the frontline. We can never thank them enough!”
|
---
**Upcoming Events – Check Our Website!**
We continue our Tele-Town Halls and other virtual events, so check our website regularly for information about the campaign and opportunities to ask Corky _your_ questions.

**_Coming up this week_**

Cheshire County - Tuesday, May 12, 1 p.m.
[**RSVP Here**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e1078dfac7598c9/5aec8337a6c98aadc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Northern New Hampshire - Thursday, May 14, 6:30 p.m.
[**RSVP Here**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e1078dfac7598c9/d3d4c8a43ee00bf3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e1078dfac7598c9/dc5650f6a5eb8836c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: It’s time to reopen our country, we need to hear from you again, and Gen. Flynn’s treatment is a disgrace
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20129-9b0f32b609974c88877c1478bf16dfd5/83/207/9a57f3e3-0fba-451d-b19a-abe45e634689)** As the United States continues our battle against the Coronavirus, we are making great strides in defeating this deadly virus. While researchers race for a cure and healthcare workers continue providing excellent, life-saving care — we believe we have succeeded in flattening the curve. This is a pivotal step, not only in defeating the deadly virus, but in re-opening our great nation. As a result of the tremendous progress made in all areas, many states have begun the process of planning/beginning to re-open society. This is a vital step, as this week's unemployment numbers painted a grim picture. As it stands now, over 30 million Americans have filed for unemployment during this crisis. Our great nation, which months ago was setting market records and achieving record low unemployment, has fallen into economic crisis. Now, we must take immediate steps to defeat this crisis. It's time to re-open America in a way that protects the health of vulnerable Americans and our livelihoods, so that we can provide for our families. Lockdowns, unemployment checks, and government stimulus are not the answer. The only thing that will restart the economy is letting the American people work again. The government should not be able to determine which jobs are essential and which jobs are not essential. Every job that employs an American citizen, that allows them to provide for themselves and their family, is an essential job. [Our message](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LTliMGYzMmI2MDk5NzRjODg4NzdjMTQ3OGJmMTZkZmQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvbmV3cy90cHAtYWN0aW9uLXJlYWN0cy10by11bmVtcGxveW1lbnQtY2xhaW1zLXJlcG9ydC8_bWlkPTQxOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=QXxzJce9_OXuZffMDFBPRA) is clear: “WE ARE AMERICANS. WE WANT TO GET BACK TO WORK.” [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LTliMGYzMmI2MDk5NzRjODg4NzdjMTQ3OGJmMTZkZmQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvbmV3cy90cHAtYWN0aW9uLXJlYWN0cy10by11bmVtcGxveW1lbnQtY2xhaW1zLXJlcG9ydC8_bWlkPTQxOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=h9-OfEaz8nNt4NRoW0gl5g) **[TPP Action Reacts to Unemployment Claims Report](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LTliMGYzMmI2MDk5NzRjODg4NzdjMTQ3OGJmMTZkZmQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvbmV3cy90cHAtYWN0aW9uLXJlYWN0cy10by11bmVtcGxveW1lbnQtY2xhaW1zLXJlcG9ydC8_bWlkPTQxOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=9GDXjZHgHttU_3KeyX6UiA)** Tea Party Patriots Action Honorary Chairman Jenny Beth Martin — responding to the release of new numbers this morning showing another 3.8 million Americans filing for unemployment benefits — released the following statement: **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LTliMGYzMmI2MDk5NzRjODg4NzdjMTQ3OGJmMTZkZmQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvbmV3cy90cHAtYWN0aW9uLXJlYWN0cy10by11bmVtcGxveW1lbnQtY2xhaW1zLXJlcG9ydC8_bWlkPTQxOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=OdCf2jn0i1iPAbiwifwgoA)** | |

The Coronavirus, or as some call it the Wuhan Virus, originated in China. The steps that the Chinese Communist Party took to suppress information and their authoritarian manipulation of data make them liable for the disease’s spread to the entire globe. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LTliMGYzMmI2MDk5NzRjODg4NzdjMTQ3OGJmMTZkZmQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvbmV3cy93aGF0LXhpLWtuZXctYW5kLXdoZW4taGUta25ldy1pdC8_bWlkPTQxOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=-cjAmMgoAhZvRAEKnQwcmw)**

To help accomplish our goal of re-opening America, Tea Party Patriots Foundation, the FreedomWorks Foundation, the American Legislative Exchange Council, the Committee to Unleash Prosperity, and other conservative organizations have come together [to launch **Save Our Country**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LTliMGYzMmI2MDk5NzRjODg4NzdjMTQ3OGJmMTZkZmQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvbmV3cy9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtZ3JvdXBzLWxhdW5jaC1zYXZlLW91ci1jb3VudHJ5LWNvYWxpdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQxOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=E0rjXp08Ir9qfYLAA1SYTg), a project of the Great American Reopening Coalition.

Led by honorary national chairman Dr. Art Laffer, **Save Our Country** aims to educate and inform elected officials and policymakers at all levels of government in an effort to bring about a quick, safe, and responsible reopening of US society. This coalition will exist until it is clear that the US economy has once again stabilized. We are ready to help American workers safely get back to work.

**[America’s Food Distribution Chain Is Essential](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LTliMGYzMmI2MDk5NzRjODg4NzdjMTQ3OGJmMTZkZmQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTY%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9qZW5ueWJldGhtYXJ0aW4vMjAyMC8wNC8zMC9hbWVyaWNhcy1mb29kLWRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvbi1jaGFpbi1pcy1lc3NlbnRpYWwtbjI1Njc5MDE_bWlkPTQxOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=cC-KxkRNl_8cCxYnsixEUQ)**
“It's fairly likely we’re going to be eating more canned foods and have less fresh fruits and vegetables available.” An ominous warning decades ago out of the Soviet Union? Hardly. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LTliMGYzMmI2MDk5NzRjODg4NzdjMTQ3OGJmMTZkZmQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTc%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9qZW5ueWJldGhtYXJ0aW4vMjAyMC8wNC8zMC9hbWVyaWNhcy1mb29kLWRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvbi1jaGFpbi1pcy1lc3NlbnRpYWwtbjI1Njc5MDE_bWlkPTQxOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=vnbgWsIXg_NntptEeJVtpA)**

Earlier this week, newly unsealed documents definitively proved that Lieutenant Gen. Michael Flynn was set up by the FBI...

The documents included handwritten notes, [which clearly showed the FBI’s intentions](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LTliMGYzMmI2MDk5NzRjODg4NzdjMTQ3OGJmMTZkZmQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzL3N0YXR1cy8xMjU1ODc2Mjg3Mjk1NjM5NTU1P3M9MjAmbWlkPTQxOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=AcNg5x3cafpsO6T_1sZx1A) with the investigation into Flynn, saying, “get him to lie, so we can prosecute or get him fired.”

On top of that, the documents showed that nearly a full year prior to Michael Flynn agreeing to a plea bargain, the FBI had prepared a document saying they were closing the case. But, Peter Strzok and other corrupt agents intervened to stop the document from being published.

The actions taken by the FBI make one thing clear: they were out to get Michael Flynn at all costs.

Flynn should be given a full pardon.
|

clean_body: As the United States continues our battle against the Coronavirus, we are making great strides in defeating this deadly virus. While researchers race for a cure and healthcare workers continue providing excellent, life-saving care — we believe we have succeeded in flattening the curve. This is a pivotal step, not only in defeating the deadly virus, but in re-opening our great nation. As a result of the tremendous progress made in all areas, many states have begun the process of planning/beginning to re-open society. This is a vital step, as this week's unemployment numbers painted a grim picture. As it stands now, over 30 million Americans have filed for unemployment during this crisis. Our great nation, which months ago was setting market records and achieving record low unemployment, has fallen into economic crisis. Now, we must take immediate steps to defeat this crisis. It's time to re-open America in a way that protects the health of vulnerable Americans and our livelihoods, so that we can provide for our families. Lockdowns, unemployment checks, and government stimulus are not the answer. The only thing that will restart the economy is letting the American people work again. The government should not be able to determine which jobs are essential and which jobs are not essential. Every job that employs an American citizen, that allows them to provide for themselves and their family, is an essential job. is clear: “WE ARE AMERICANS. WE WANT TO GET BACK TO WORK.” Tea Party Patriots Action Honorary Chairman Jenny Beth Martin — responding to the release of new numbers this morning showing another 3.8 million Americans filing for unemployment benefits — released the following statement: | | We Need to Hear from You Again We want to know how the lockdowns are affecting you. | The Coronavirus, or as some call it the Wuhan Virus, originated in China. The steps that the Chinese Communist Party took to suppress information and their authoritarian manipulation of data make them liable for the disease’s spread to the entire globe. | To help accomplish our goal of re-opening America, Tea Party Patriots Foundation, the FreedomWorks Foundation, the American Legislative Exchange Council, the Committee to Unleash Prosperity, and other conservative organizations have come together , a project of the Great American Reopening Coalition. Led by honorary national chairman Dr. Art Laffer, Save Our Country aims to educate and inform elected officials and policymakers at all levels of government in an effort to bring about a quick, safe, and responsible reopening of US society. This coalition will exist until it is clear that the US economy has once again stabilized. We are ready to help American workers safely get back to work. and follow the ongoing efforts of Save Our Country and other projects. FreedomWorks Foundation, American Legislative Exchange Council, Tea Party Patriots and Committee to Unleash Prosperity in partnership with a coalition of conservative organizations and prominent individuals,... | ICYMI: Tea Party Patriots Action Honorary Chairman Jenny Beth Martin discussing the vital role America’s food distribution chain plays and how this global pandemic has shown that government lockdowns only hurt this vital chain. “It's fairly likely we’re going to be eating more canned foods and have less fresh fruits and vegetables available.” An ominous warning decades ago out of the Soviet Union? Hardly. | Earlier this week, newly unsealed documents definitively proved that Lieutenant Gen. Michael Flynn was set up by the FBI... The documents included handwritten notes, with the investigation into Flynn, saying, “get him to lie, so we can prosecute or get him fired.” On top of that, the documents showed that nearly a full year prior to Michael Flynn agreeing to a plea bargain, the FBI had prepared a document saying they were closing the case. But, Peter Strzok and other corrupt agents intervened to stop the document from being published. The actions taken by the FBI make one thing clear: they were out to get Michael Flynn at all costs. Flynn should be given a full pardon. | |

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Flynn vindicated: let’s thank Attorney General Barr
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
I want to thank Attorney General Barr for standing his ground and being objective in his approach to justice. That’s why I’m launching this petition to thank Attorney General Barr and let Washington know that we think the case against Michael Flynn was a travesty.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42457304&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTczMDQS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,
Before President Trump even took office, the left started working overtime to remove him. Based on what we learned from the Mueller report and declassified documents, it’s clear that the real crime that Democrats were investigating was the crime of beating Hillary Clinton.

One of the key components of the Russia investigation was the case against National Security Advisor Michael Flynn. Just yesterday, the Department of Justice confirmed what many of us knew all along:

The case against former Michael Flynn was a political set up and a travesty of justice.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTczMDQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 VINDICATED
At the direction of James Comey, FBI investigators tried to set up Michael Flynn without any legitimate investigative basis. They then hid evidence from Flynn’s attorneys and threatened to prosecute Flynn’s son to force Flynn to plead guilty to a crime he never committed.

Attorney General William Barr made the right decision to end this travesty of justice and drop the case against General Flynn. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTczMDQS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 I want to thank Attorney General Barr for standing his ground and being objective in his approach to justice. That’s why I’m launching this petition to thank Attorney General Barr and let Washington know that we think the case against Michael Flynn was a travesty.
Sign HERE to thank Attorney General Barr for dropping the case against Michael Flynn http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTczMDQS1&kn=20&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Right now, the media is attacking Attorney General Barr, but even the most biased reporters can’t come up with a single reason why Flynn should have been investigated in the first place.

This decision will enrage the radical left who will continue to try to destroy President Trump. Thankfully, Attorney General Barr has shown time and again that he will stick to the facts and uphold his duty to preserve our justice system.

So, add your name to our petition http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTczMDQS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0, and show the radical left that the American people stand behind AG Barr and, more importantly, behind justice.SIGN HERE http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTczMDQS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 In service,

Tom http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTczMDQS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

Privacy Policy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTczMDQS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42457304&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDc3NTcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kansans=20for=20LaTurner?=
subject: 18, that's it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| |
---
| | | We'll cut to the chase. After the most recent fundraising report, there is one number that we found so shocking that we wanted to bring it to your attention.

The number is **18**.

**_That's how many people living in Kansas' 2nd congressional district our opponent has reported to have actually contributed money to his campaign in the past six months since Jake LaTurner entered the race for Congress._** In the past six months, our sitting Congressman has only reported being able to garner the financial support for reelection from **18 people** he represents in Congress.

In fact, just yesterday, an article came out showing that [Jake is dominating his opponent on in-state and in-district contributions.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9d2ed45d23&e=1050d051da)

Do you know who our current congressman is getting financial backing from? _**Lobbyists and special interest groups in Washington D.C., and people who live in New York, Illinois, and California.**_

**This is the definition of being part of the swamp**. We need a congressman who is in touch with the people he represents, the ones who live right here in our district. Kansas is our state. The things that matter to us should matter to our congressman, and we are committed to ensuring that Kansas voices are the ones Jake will be listening to when he is elected to Congress.

We are incredibly humbled by the many Kansans in the 2nd district who continue to support Jake LaTurner's campaign for Congress by offering financial support as well as words of support and encouragement. Kansas is Jake's home too and you can always count on him to fight for what matters to us.

[Donate now to help send someone to DC who will stand for our Kansas values. $50, $25, or even $5 helps. ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=61e6be444c&e=1050d051da)

May God bless you all with health and safety.

Yours in the fight,

Kansans for LaTurner
---
|
---

name: Murray Huber
subject: Three things we *really* need to focus on:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We need a strong financial base right now to execute our big plans.
#
Hi, I'm Murray, Charles' Field Director.
My job is organizing volunteers and directing voter outreach. We're less than 50 days away from the primary and we have big plans to make sure we score a grassroots victory in June and then go on to defeat Mitch McConnell come November.
**[Building our volunteer force and expanding our voter outreach program is vital right now to execute our big plans for the rest of the month, so I’m asking right now if you’d be able to chip in $5, $10, or anything you can afford. Will you join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17427585/193825819/988755606?refcode=em20200508-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzOWU3OS03ZTkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_eZBgt5TbJbQxuC9lLUg1XJ7tvED9IaiwBhGrgLHTmc=)**
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17427586/193825820/988755606?refcode=em20200508-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzOWU3OS03ZTkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_eZBgt5TbJbQxuC9lLUg1XJ7tvED9IaiwBhGrgLHTmc=)**
Here are the three areas we need to _really_ hone our focus in on to win:
* **Increasing our volume of phone calls made to Kentuckians across the state. If we're going to build a movement that's big enough to defeat Mitch, we need everyone on board.** This means we need to reach out to folks in rural areas, Black and Brown communities, and anyone else who's been left out in our politics.
* **Continuing to run timely digital advertising campaigns** to grow our support base across the state and around the nation.
* **Training and supporting our growing team** of Digital Organizers to help mobilize voters and turn them out to the polls on Election Day.

**I wouldn't be writing to you and asking for your help unless it was vitally important.** But running a great campaign, particularly one that's 100% online, costs a lot of money.
Our campaign invests thousands of dollars _a month_ on digital tools like our email platform, virtual canvassing program, and phone lines to ensure that we can spread Charles' bold, progressive message to every corner of our Commonwealth.
And with about a month and a half to go until the primary, we need more money than ever so we can take our voter outreach and volunteer programs to the next level.
**[If you believe that every Kentuckian deserves a chance to hear Charles' bold, progressive message, please, chip in whatever you can afford right now to our campaign. No donation is too small, and every dollar counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17427600/193825834/988755606?refcode=em20200508-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzOWU3OS03ZTkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_eZBgt5TbJbQxuC9lLUg1XJ7tvED9IaiwBhGrgLHTmc=)**
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17427601/193825835/988755606?refcode=em20200508-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzOWU3OS03ZTkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_eZBgt5TbJbQxuC9lLUg1XJ7tvED9IaiwBhGrgLHTmc=)**
Thanks for listening,
Murray Huber, Field Director
Booker for Kentucky

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17427602/193825836/988755606?refcode=em20200508-2-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzOWU3OS03ZTkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_eZBgt5TbJbQxuC9lLUg1XJ7tvED9IaiwBhGrgLHTmc=)****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17427603/193825837/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzOWU3OS03ZTkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_eZBgt5TbJbQxuC9lLUg1XJ7tvED9IaiwBhGrgLHTmc=&emci=638fd9fd-7791-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=91839e79-7e91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17427604/193825838/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzOWU3OS03ZTkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_eZBgt5TbJbQxuC9lLUg1XJ7tvED9IaiwBhGrgLHTmc=&emci=638fd9fd-7791-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=91839e79-7e91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17427605/193825839/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzOWU3OS03ZTkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_eZBgt5TbJbQxuC9lLUg1XJ7tvED9IaiwBhGrgLHTmc=&emci=638fd9fd-7791-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=91839e79-7e91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)

name: Team Tina
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
**__GOOD NEWS:__** Republicans may have had the advantage heading into this election cycle, but major election forecasters are now saying Democrats can flip the Senate. **__BAD NEWS:__** A new report just listed Minnesota as **one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip red this November.** Republicans know this is a must-win seat for Democrats to flip the Senate, and it’s a must-win state to send Donald Trump packing. They’re going to spend whatever it takes to flip Minnesota red, which is why we’re asking: **Will you add a grassroots donation of any amount to help us save Minnesota’s Senate seat and make sure our state stays blue? Now’s the time to prepare for the GOP’s nasty attacks. name: Team Christy
subject: We're behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

There are no two ways to slice it. We are down right now.

Republicans are turning in their ballots faster than Democrats. We might just lose this toss-up election.

In the last few days, as we've ramped up our ads and volunteer calls, things have been improving. But we're running out of time and we're running out of money.

**[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to power us across the finish line. We can't lose this race. And with your help, we won't.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf4/29776869/a693849/569f03e2/398919094/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_onemillion13-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf4/29776869/a693849/569f03e3/398919094/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_onemillion13-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbf4/29776869/a693849/569f03fc/398919094/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_onemillion13-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

With only a few days left before ballots are counted, we have to leave it all on the playing field.

Every single vote counts in this incredibly close "Toss-Up" race. That's why we're trying to call and text as many voters as possible, put our digital ads up online, and reach every voter we can.

That's why we're asking for your support with just a few days left. Every dollar makes a difference, and every vote makes a difference.

name: Mark Warner Rapid Response Team
subject: GOP attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
In just the past week top Trump allies have been coming out of the woodwork to attack Mark Warner for his efforts to hold the Trump administration accountable.
|
---
| | Derek --

In just the past week top Trump allies have been coming out of the woodwork to attack Mark Warner for his efforts to hold the Trump administration accountable. Here's just a partial list of the people and organizations joining in on the attacks:
* Donald Trump, Jr.,
* A leading alt-right conspiracy theorist,
* Sebastian Gorka,
* A top Trump Campaign spokesperson,
* and the Republican Party of Virginia

This is just a preview of the opposition we'll see between now and November, Derek. The last time Mark was up for re-election, Washington, D.C. Republicans spent millions to defeat him, and the election was decided by less than a percentage point.

We can't take any chances this time around, so we're working hard right now to build a strong support network to help Mark win re-election and keep up his important work in the Senate. [**Will you chip in today and help Mark Warner build the campaign infrastructure we'll need to keep Virginia blue this November?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4aa/53d9897e/54f367d5/1c886ed9/1892519866/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gopattacks?refcode=20200508_f_1_nd__570__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

Mark's work in the Senate has clearly struck a nerve with the Trump campaign. The President has personally targeted Virginia, and his well-funded Trump Victory Initiative continues to hold grassroots organizing events across the Commonwealth, in an effort to flip Virginia red and erase the progress we've made.

We're determined to make sure that doesn't happen, and we need your help. We're going to keep Virginia blue and take back the Senate -- do we have your support?

[**Help Mark Warner build the grassroots organization he'll need to win in November.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4aa/53d9897e/54f367d5/1c886ed8/1892519866/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gopattacks?refcode=20200508_f_1_nd__570__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4aa/53d9897e/54f367d5/1c886ec7/1892519866/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gopattacks?refcode=20200508_f_1_nd__570__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

Dear supporters, 17,000 Democrats have already cast their ballots by mail as of yesterday! The election is here and people are voting every day. We know they're voting Canning for Congress because we're texting, calling, and interacting online with thousands of voters. This election cycle is markedly different, with DeFazio facing a challenge in the May 19 primary from Doyle Canning, a graduate of the University of Oregon School of Law, community organizer and social activist. Canning openly accuses DeFazio of having become involved in the bureaucracy and beholden to special interest groups. Further, Doyle said she feels there are unexplored opportunities to better support all Oregon families. "Our Congressman has been taking money from the health insurance lobbyists, Amazon, weapons makers, big Pharma and fossil fuels for years," Canning stated. "I have spent 20 years taking on big polluters, Wall Street Banks and big corporations, waging uphill battles and winning. I know how to build strong connections with the people I serve."

Canning studied education and began her career as a community organizer in rural communities, educating farmers and neighbors about the risks of GMOs and chemical-intensive agriculture. She became a leader in progressive social movements. She co-founded the Center for Story-based Strategy and co-authored "Re:Imagining Change" a book about how to use stories to change the world. Canning and her husband Justin have two children and lives in Eugene."

Peter DeFazio has been mailing it in for far too long in Congress. What we really need now more than ever in Washington, D.C., are young, excited fighters like DeFazio's challenger Doyle Canning. We don't need campaigns like Canning's in the future. We need them right now. We needed them years ago. Now is the time to support someone who will take a stand for the working class. Continuing to support our savvy, seasoned congressman as though he is the Second Coming will only maintain the status quo, at best, which even before this global pandemic meant suffering and struggle for millions of Americans. We must hold our politicians accountable and demand that they actually fight for us to have livable futures. This is a do-or-die time in American politics. We do not have time for DeFazio's empty re-election promises, especially when it comes to climate policy. DeFazio and Canning must debate so that the voters of District 4 can see firsthand who the real candidate to support is." - _Ruby Jernigan, __Eugene_

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: re: saving the U.S. Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I'm raising my voice to protect the U.S. Postal Service. I need you to join me.
| | |
---
Friend,

**The U.S. Postal Service is in _serious_ ****danger:** Postal workers are getting sick, mail volume is dropping - and without emergency funding, this vital institution could be insolvent by September.
**We can 't let this happen, friend.** An insolvent Postal Service would mean 600,000 hardworking people could lose their jobs. It would make it harder for communities across our country - especially those in rural areas - to access lifesaving medications, wages and Social Security benefits. And with millions of voters planning to cast their ballots by mail this November, it could put our constitutional right to vote at risk.
I'm raising my voice to support this essential service, but congressional action is the _only_ thing that can save the USPS from catastrophe - and I need your help to demand it. **[_Please, friend, will you click here to add your name to our petition demanding Congress take action now to save the Postal Service? Since this is so urgent, I 'm looking to get 2,000 signatures by midnight tonight._](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk216-ja-nd")**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk216-ja-nd")
---
Thanks so much for raising your voice with me on this critical issue.

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7c2/288179be/bb47048/348e988a/103229577/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Test your knowledge about the coronavirus, working together to #SaveOurCountry, and more
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20129-8c32ef33e5034b89acd5fdca2fd76dd8/83/94/ce585726-9bcb-4361-b504-f2abf443634f)** After nearly 2 months of our country, and most of the world, being closed for business, America is finally beginning to re-open. Many states have begun the process of re-opening their economy, providing vital relief to over 30 million unemployed Americans. The latest unemployment numbers have shown that in a matter of months we have gone from record low unemployment to unemployment numbers that we haven't seen since the Great Depression. While we must take proper safety precautions to help protect American lives, we must re-open society to preserve American livelihoods. It is not the job of government to deem which jobs are and are not "essential." The fact is, any job that allows an American citizen provide for themselves and their family is essential. It is essential to them. We applaud the states that have begun the vital process of safely re-opening their economy and we look forward to seeing the continued progress. Together, we will not only defeat this virus, but we will re-build our economy and continue breaking economic records like we were just a short time ago. | |
---
As America begins the process of re-opening our country and re-building our economy, we need your help.

Two vital measures that we continue to push for are:
1. Discouraging any further bailout packages
2. The passage of a payroll tax holiday

The answer to the economic crisis we currently face is NOT further federal government bailouts. No amount of government spending can support and sustain the over 30 million unemployed Americans.

What we need to get the American people safely back to work, so they can reclaim their livelihoods. And once they return to work, we must stop big government from taking their hard-earned money. After all, it’s not just a virus that threatens lives; it is also economic catastrophe that results in more suicides, more domestic abuse, higher rates of drug and alcohol use, and more. Allowing Americans to support their families once again will also save lives and is the only true, long-term solution to the economic crisis we now face.

If you agree, please help us spread this message far and wide. Post on social media, write to your Members of Congress, do whatever you can to help get this vital message out. And when doing so please use the hashtag #SaveOurCountry.

Also, please consider [signing this letter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LThjMzJlZjMzZTUwMzRiODlhY2Q1ZmRjYTJmZDc2ZGQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2dvLnBhcmRvdC5jb20vbC81NjcwMTIvMjAyMC0wNC0yOS9nd2t2eXg_bWlkPTQxOTczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=SydFWIIoN7CNRlnwi0RcLA) from the American Legislative Exchange Council telling state leaders to say "No Thanks" to a federal bailout.
[ SIGN THE LETTER ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LThjMzJlZjMzZTUwMzRiODlhY2Q1ZmRjYTJmZDc2ZGQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2dvLnBhcmRvdC5jb20vbC81NjcwMTIvMjAyMC0wNC0yOS9nd2t2eXg_bWlkPTQxOTczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=y3ttPqZtPBCKd6g6GrwX5g)
|

ICYMI: I joined Mark Levin live on his radio show to discuss the movement to re-open American and #SaveOurCountry.

**[You don't want to miss this interview.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LThjMzJlZjMzZTUwMzRiODlhY2Q1ZmRjYTJmZDc2ZGQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wbGF5bGlzdC5tZWdhcGhvbmUuZm0vP2U9V1dPNjA1MTY3ODkxOSZzdGFydD01OTU1Jm1pZD00MTk3MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=PyFLdSp39Ht1tK1XcoK_fQ)**

In an effort to fight the rampant disinformation from the Democratic Party and the Mainstream Media, concerning the Coronavirus and the Trump Administration's response, [we have created a quiz](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LThjMzJlZjMzZTUwMzRiODlhY2Q1ZmRjYTJmZDc2ZGQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY29yb25hdmlydXMtcXVpei8_bWlkPTQxOTczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=EYE0VEmO285S4x3jIaHKjQ).

This quiz provides the truth and indisputable facts concerning the coronavirus pandemic and the Trump Administration's response.
[ TAKE THE QUIZ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LThjMzJlZjMzZTUwMzRiODlhY2Q1ZmRjYTJmZDc2ZGQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY29yb25hdmlydXMtcXVpei8_bWlkPTQxOTczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=wcOeRzWI2qwcDmY4r9rdqQ)
|

This week was not only a good week for re-opening our country, it was also a good week for justice...

That’s because the FBI was exposed for corruptly working to set-up Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn and actively trying to destroy his life.

When this utter corruption was brought to the light of day, the criminal case against Gen. Flynn was dropped. As the saying goes, “the truth will set you free,” and the truth set Gen. Flynn free.

But, as I pointed out [in my latest op-ed](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI5LThjMzJlZjMzZTUwMzRiODlhY2Q1ZmRjYTJmZDc2ZGQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9qZW5ueWJldGhtYXJ0aW4vMjAyMC8wNC8zMC9hbWVyaWNhcy1mb29kLWRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvbi1jaGFpbi1pcy1lc3NlbnRpYWwtbjI1Njc5MDE_bWlkPTQxOTczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Zi0ch3zYOhMbYFG_sYGh-g), this isn't the first time we’ve seen “public servants” abusing their power to attack innocent people and groups who happen to hold different viewpoints from those in charge.

We've seen this before, and while disappointed, we aren’t shocked.
