clean_body: After nearly 2 months of our country, and most of the world, being closed for business, America is finally beginning to re-open. Many states have begun the process of re-opening their economy, providing vital relief to over 30 million unemployed Americans. The latest unemployment numbers have shown that in a matter of months we have gone from record low unemployment to unemployment numbers that we haven't seen since the Great Depression. While we must take proper safety precautions to help protect American lives, we must re-open society to preserve American livelihoods. It is not the job of government to deem which jobs are and are not "essential." The fact is, any job that allows an American citizen provide for themselves and their family is essential. It is essential to them. We applaud the states that have begun the vital process of safely re-opening their economy and we look forward to seeing the continued progress. Together, we will not only defeat this virus, but we will re-build our economy and continue breaking economic records like we were just a short time ago. | | As America begins the process of re-opening our country and re-building our economy, we need your help. Two vital measures that we continue to push for are: 1. Discouraging any further bailout packages 2. The passage of a payroll tax holiday The answer to the economic crisis we currently face is NOT further federal government bailouts. No amount of government spending can support and sustain the over 30 million unemployed Americans. What we need to get the American people safely back to work, so they can reclaim their livelihoods. And once they return to work, we must stop big government from taking their hard-earned money. After all, it’s not just a virus that threatens lives; it is also economic catastrophe that results in more suicides, more domestic abuse, higher rates of drug and alcohol use, and more. Allowing Americans to support their families once again will also save lives and is the only true, long-term solution to the economic crisis we now face. If you agree, please help us spread this message far and wide. Post on social media, write to your Members of Congress, do whatever you can to help get this vital message out. And when doing so please use the hashtag #SaveOurCountry. Also, please consider from the American Legislative Exchange Council telling state leaders to say "No Thanks" to a federal bailout. | ICYMI: I joined Mark Levin live on his radio show to discuss the movement to re-open American and #SaveOurCountry. | In an effort to fight the rampant disinformation from the Democratic Party and the Mainstream Media, concerning the Coronavirus and the Trump Administration's response, . This quiz provides the truth and indisputable facts concerning the coronavirus pandemic and the Trump Administration's response. | This week was not only a good week for re-opening our country, it was also a good week for justice... That’s because the FBI was exposed for corruptly working to set-up Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn and actively trying to destroy his life. When this utter corruption was brought to the light of day, the criminal case against Gen. Flynn was dropped. As the saying goes, “the truth will set you free,” and the truth set Gen. Flynn free. But, as I pointed out , this isn't the first time we’ve seen “public servants” abusing their power to attack innocent people and groups who happen to hold different viewpoints from those in charge. We've seen this before, and while disappointed, we aren’t shocked. Last week’s revelations about contemporaneous FBI notes in the case of Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn make it abundantly clear – there is no question that Gen. Flynn was railroaded by the FBI, in what can only be described as an appalling abuse of power by so-called “public servants.” | |

name: Michael Bennet
subject: an update on how we’re fighting back against this crisis >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
Hello, friend,
It’s been a while since we last spoke—and the world is a very different place now. So I want to take the time today to give you an update on the work I’ve done over the last few months.
Throughout March and April, Susan and I were fortunate to have our girls—Caroline, Halina, and Anne—with us in Colorado. We spent the time at home, doing our part to flatten the curve.
[https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/-/Bennetfamilywalk1.jpeg/@mx_500@r_180]
Since the pandemic began, I’ve spoken with tens of thousands of constituents via Zoom videos and conference calls, learning about what’s keeping them up at night, how their businesses are affected, how their kids are doing in school, and what the Senate can do to help.
While I was energized by the resolve, strength, and innovativeness of Coloradans, these conversations also reminded me just how out of touch Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their allies are with the crisis faced by hard-working Americans.
This is simply unacceptable, and it’s why I’ve been in Washington this week with my Senate colleagues to fight for relief for the families and workers who need it most.
Here are a few of the changes I’m fighting for: *
Providing
personal
protective
equipment
(PPE)
to
those
who
need
it
most:
Doctors,
nurses,
and
other
frontline
healthcare
workers
face
grave
shortages
of
masks,
gloves,
and
other
protective
equipment—as
do
our
food
industry
workers
who
are
doing
the
hard
work
of
keeping
Americans
fed
throughout
the
crisis.
*
Supporting
workers,
families,
and
small
businesses
in
a
struggling
economy:
In
times
of
economic
crisis,
we
should
have
an
automatic
and
immediate
response
to
support
families
and
businesses—including
direct
cash
payments,
unemployment
insurance,
expanded
SNAP
nutrition
benefits,
and
increased
Medicaid
support.
We
also
need
to
fix
issues
with
PPP
so
we
can
give
better-targeted
relief
to
hard-hit
businesses,
such
as
restaurants
and
hotels.
*
Increased
support
for
state
and
local
governments:
We
need
to
increase
funding
so
local
governments
aren’t
forced
to
lay
off
teachers,
police
officers,
and
fire
fighters,
or
shortchange
critical
repairs
to
our
roads
and
bridges.
This
includes
at
least
$500
billion
for
states
and
$250
billion
for
local
governments.
I won’t lie, friend: these are huge goals. But the scope of the recovery must match the unprecedented scale of this crisis.
I know you may feel frustrated or even hopeless, but the best way to help is by staying home, wearing your mask, and following the guidance from your local health department. Although it may feel like you aren’t doing much, we're starting to see the difference that can make in Colorado.
If you’re looking for more ways to help, I spent a day volunteering with the Food Bank of the Rockies in Denver, staying distant and delivering fresh food boxes to Coloradans. As people across the country face record levels of food insecurity, mobile food pantries like this one are taking on ever-growing importance. If you’re financially able, making a donation to them, or your local food bank, would be greatly appreciated.
[https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/-/MFBfoodbank.jpg]

CHIP IN TO THE FOOD BANK OF THE ROCKIES [https://secure3.convio.net/fbr/site/Donation2;jsessionid=00000000.app30037a?df_id=5681&mfc_pref=T&5681.donation=form1&NONCE_TOKEN=89A200D26C737E32FEA68CFB089E7CE7]

I know times may seem dark now. But I also know we live in a country that is up to the challenge we face. It won’t be a short fight—or an easy one—but if we unite around a common goal, we will make our world a safer, healthier, stronger place for this generation and the next.
Together,
Michael
Thank you for being a part of Michael’s re-election campaign!
Sending emails is a crucial way to keep supporters like you updated on what Michael is doing in Colorado and Washington D.C. to fight for progress in a purple state. Plus, this campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you! Will you chip in today to join Michael in the fight for a better tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
DONATE TO ELECT MICHAEL BENNET >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse – thank you so much. We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for your support.

Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
Contributions or gifts to Bennet for Colorado are not tax deductible.

If you would like to receive only the most urgent updates from our campaign, please click here [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails] . To unsubscribe, please click here [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/569c341f-9a90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/41accf07-8f91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWFjY2YwNy04ZjkxLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NdNPcivDirqSzhgtQB4bZYCsxvC9a5zuVMwiRVoF3Ag=&id=102145602&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com] .

body:
MJ just emailed me about how important the Flip the Senate Fund is...

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ba/7f51f7bc/4f9b1872/4ef15a7f/4167115722/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

MJ just emailed to see how the Flip the Senate Fund is going, and right now it's going pretty well, but we still have a bunch of work to do before I feel confident in the number I'm sending back to her. **[Can I count on you to donate to the Flip the Senate Fund and help MJ take control of the Senate away from Mitch McConnell?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ba/7f51f7bc/4f9b1872/4ef15a7e/4167115722/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-flipthesenate?refcode=email_20200508.3nd_5__1371__&amount=10")**

A strong Flip the Senate Fund number isn't just about the resources it provides us. It's about showing everyone that in spite of in-person events being suspended, we're still hitting our goals. MJ is the leader to take on Sen. Cornyn and be one of the four seats we need to flip the Senate, but she needs your help. **[If you're able, will you donate $5 today to help MJ complete her mission and flip the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ba/7f51f7bc/4f9b1872/4ef15a7d/4167115722/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-flipthesenate?refcode=email_20200508.3nd_5__1371__&amount=5")**

Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar**
Subject: Flip the Senate Fund Update?
To: Taylor Klos (mjfortexas.com)
> Hey Taylor!
>
> Was hoping to get an update on our Flip the Senate Fund? This is a critical focus for the campaign for the runoff and beyond -- after all, if we want to see anything happen in our government, we've got to take away Mitch McConnell's control over the legislative process! I know our team will carry this one home for us like they always have! How's it looking?
>
> Looking forward to the good news!
>
> \-- MJ

body:
Have you pledged to defend life? Friend,

Did you get our earlier note about signing up to join Greg in supporting the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act?
We’re gathering as many grassroots signatures as possible to send a strong message that HOOSIERS STAND FOR LIFE.
Will you add your name to our petition now?: **[https://secure.winred.com/gregpence/Life](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c9e376035c144e528d7c0844fc060657&_e=2yHTEdzsc0LixZZTmBw5Fstro3EP-dmHgA5c8muzwoOSfWP4uWmwCP0SF_9RJfo4l7r-uF5q4_el9RSbBUrL8vb6NRTNDFCebYzu0Bkk_XRFaT7PZxx_x4VioYPR1zosjoDhfRaJIdqsbR48cDEhFYx3JEUq1pF5W2W4IuGQcYBzzfz-ttDJoo623e5ySdQx4y_NCDjP9Awvo1yJNhPvkaieS0XCGu7beW1E-3PlgGOjh8gElkaog7yJZn9ylG9ArFGYXl-3DT7JCCO32FBWfuWNDN4n7Eon5ZZAasuciB5B5LhZj2VAt2I5-sgjV2aCxlqPnZ2m_VTrt_P4_hCrgxhT9kcl-2DPJQs9kOEhvUXSe_5HPNQ_5Eb1pW928dMoU56hZfXIc7N_HY4JLTVERiNoh-Wv8puZwWxjKMcYwg7S2i0uBfKD0HlbRlVPKoVu48_GmMJs-NgYNsHWTt6rk9RVKJ4MqH6NhW_ZUeqN1Bg%3D)**
If you need more information about our fight, please read the email attached. It’s important.
After you’ve read, please, add your name to join our fight to treat each life with the respect and dignity it deserves. [ **SIGN THE PETITION** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c9e376035c144e528d7c0844fc060657&_e=2yHTEdzsc0LixZZTmBw5Fstro3EP-dmHgA5c8muzwoOSfWP4uWmwCP0SF_9RJfo4l7r-uF5q4_el9RSbBUrL8vb6NRTNDFCebYzu0Bkk_XRFaT7PZxx_x4VioYPR1zosjoDhfRaJIdqsbR48cDEhFYx3JEUq1pF5W2W4IuGQcYBzzfz-ttDJoo623e5ySdQx4y_NCDjP9Awvo1yJNhPvkaieS0XCGu7beW1E-3PlgGOjh8gElkaog7yJZn9ylG9ArFGYXl-3DT7JCCO32FBWfjS9iFbHR99XTfZ6o9QYrVQOeFmhkjRzs9sxP41oqWTd4Ai7TN5etpgQyVoaabLBk1DU-pT7qwRvOByg-cR8KCXeWU_dDhA8a__DUGCCxZmoO3MTD5Yj8f-x7iNlI3oDIR-yde65pZcrdcs0ocYz1YzkaIJRKiov__g0vVef7uw3Akzy7hZ0pGdnss5mxqfBCX8Edv--lzBbp6oCVkKlysQ%3D) Thanks, friend.

-Team Pence

**\----Forwarded Message Below-----** From: Team Pence Subject: re: fighting for the dignity of life To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c9e376035c144e528d7c0844fc060657&_e=2yHTEdzsc0LixZZTmBw5Fstro3EP-dmHgA5c8muzwoOSfWP4uWmwCP0SF_9RJfo4l7r-uF5q4_el9RSbBUrL8vb6NRTNDFCebYzu0Bkk_XRFaT7PZxx_x4VioYPR1zosjoDhfRaJIdqsbR48cDEhFYx3JEUq1pF5W2W4IuGQcYBzzfz-ttDJoo623e5ySdQx4y_NCDjP9Awvo1yJNhPvkaieS0XCGu7beW1E-3PlgGOjh8gElkaog7yJZn9ylG9ArFGYXl-3DT7JCCO32FBWfhGfy3VOfStwGqdhK-Arkt_WZynZcaP7u-Smfm4MjxD091R61OL0-jBMmEi22q7WeJ8j33taMlhkJ0IET8YV1j5iKM9Fn7fnfnEmWtriMLgDwsIGH8anYwwVTyn46Flcc2tLcHjk30pWbIK4O93IfIvjpfiIIEJLSAUhXvzgB_6X3-RmcRga20lzXJ9aRUtzeLZWQm_zx7F1CDcG_nlAoWM%3D)** [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c9e376035c144e528d7c0844fc060657&_e=2yHTEdzsc0LixZZTmBw5Fstro3EP-dmHgA5c8muzwoOSfWP4uWmwCP0SF_9RJfo4l7r-uF5q4_el9RSbBUrL8vb6NRTNDFCebYzu0Bkk_XRFaT7PZxx_x4VioYPR1zosjoDhfRaJIdqsbR48cDEhFYx3JEUq1pF5W2W4IuGQcYBzzfz-ttDJoo623e5ySdQx4y_NCDjP9Awvo1yJNhPvkaieS0XCGu7beW1E-3PlgGOjh8gElkaog7yJZn9ylG9ArFGYXl-3DT7JCCO32FBWfrKACqsdphgYOzZKOVwXaL0XnE8vi1po2ZX7mzFse1gwHviY-zTTIFyzvlh-b9D6b-WSde3IQd9mRQ7JTmFn6bTSuf29xjmcP7I34l6kK1IX7zcRX8gDOVnSzGd-SGVAgddrDNy32_1l8FdOQNKSUhgpX85gaKoB_Q5oz6tzBLXm2igeQSW0PZk_T1cpIYCe4MNO1nNomwDfQLTmXARYnfo%3D) Friend,

In February, Greg’s colleagues in the Senate held a special hearing on the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act.
This bill isn’t even about abortion. It’s based on a simple concept — saving the lives of babies who survive abortion attempts. [ **Support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c9e376035c144e528d7c0844fc060657&_e=2yHTEdzsc0LixZZTmBw5Fstro3EP-dmHgA5c8muzwoOSfWP4uWmwCP0SF_9RJfo4l7r-uF5q4_el9RSbBUrL8vb6NRTNDFCebYzu0Bkk_XRFaT7PZxx_x4VioYPR1zosjoDhfRaJIdqsbR48cDEhFYx3JEUq1pF5W2W4IuGQcYBzzfz-ttDJoo623e5ySdQx4y_NCDjP9Awvo1yJNhPvkaieS0XCGu7beW1E-3PlgGOjh8gElkaog7yJZn9ylG9ArFGYXl-3DT7JCCO32FBWfgBfS6r-mNXZX7IU7rqdgStlpXk6m4Erd15XFc32QnODnGBiDlojMl0wv7_TIYpJcG6ZkFz4qTLXLcn-2tIeYIFsLR2WKpLdTwVVcDgUK-qgas35IHoYZVteJ8HQZvf9_Tl5sEbDF5h5jXP5UBBTl_d-CgmbdAwarlpOX1SeGJP2NC6a7sFCmitaLG_8exm1THhwpZrltZxLt0-nJEADSgk%3D) It mandates care for babies after they have left the womb and gives every single soul a chance at life. Every single American should be able to get behind this bill, but the Democrats in the House and the Senate can’t bring themselves to support it.
**That is flat-out unacceptable.** [ **Support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c9e376035c144e528d7c0844fc060657&_e=2yHTEdzsc0LixZZTmBw5Fstro3EP-dmHgA5c8muzwoOSfWP4uWmwCP0SF_9RJfo4l7r-uF5q4_el9RSbBUrL8vb6NRTNDFCebYzu0Bkk_XRFaT7PZxx_x4VioYPR1zosjoDhfRaJIdqsbR48cDEhFYx3JEUq1pF5W2W4IuGQcYBzzfz-ttDJoo623e5ySdQx4y_NCDjP9Awvo1yJNhPvkaieS0XCGu7beW1E-3PlgGOjh8gElkaog7yJZn9ylG9ArFGYXl-3DT7JCCO32FBWflSmRH5BsAy2HbUCnq6FCNu7O7YzW1thEwJA8p5PPfThvUAx4y0EGJatI7RF6eMeCIv1p48VhRV5rduyDa3D7eln6-yhJ8hj-3z_QdXqUsDo64BcC-z4mMrWrWhS-eJM73DjLZ6fvexEq3Pa2coyW2Cmvjsp52ZPj65MekI8cV6KfdltJ64MQ9hqALSetwe4rwmuS_1ATl8VCo37bwgNyc0%3D) Greg is proud to co-sponsor the House version of the Born-Alive Survivors Protection Act. He believes in defending the most vulnerable members of our society and treating each life with respect and dignity.
**[If you want to join Greg in standing up for life, please add your name in support of the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act —>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c9e376035c144e528d7c0844fc060657&_e=2yHTEdzsc0LixZZTmBw5Fstro3EP-dmHgA5c8muzwoOSfWP4uWmwCP0SF_9RJfo4l7r-uF5q4_el9RSbBUrL8vb6NRTNDFCebYzu0Bkk_XRFaT7PZxx_x4VioYPR1zosjoDhfRaJIdqsbR48cDEhFYx3JEUq1pF5W2W4IuGQcYBzzfz-ttDJoo623e5ySdQx4y_NCDjP9Awvo1yJNhPvkaieS0XCGu7beW1E-3PlgGOjh8gElkaog7yJZn9ylG9ArFGYXl-3DT7JCCO32FBWfoHzUTZGYz-mvnOoyfMvKYjV0MidCvgF7dM0RKd2iwljY_MzvNW2lJNKPAWNZyBuJ-tEYwYLLHkfvtVuefsQrQIfDdWdJNsN9wTGxo0QunFi8818i_FmXq7qNpp3Igh1hKPG3gtU4rrwDhI2A1MfK-iIc-AwNtl0pSOLrmcRGvHxD2f2wnXuollUUYHgDzuC7nIiyGz-U0ubQ6sSKhURHHk%3D)** -Team Pence | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Best Lt. Governor in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Earlier today, Democrats picked their nominee for lieutenant governor. It was a long, chaotic process, and you might have seen they had some trouble

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/best-lt-governor-in-the-country?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Best Lt. Governor In the Country

Earlier today, Democrats picked their party's nominee for lieutenant governor. It was a long, chaotic process, and you might have seen they had some trouble finding someone to take the (short term) job. Here's a quick rundown on what happened (http://indiana.gop/news/indiana-gop-statement-indiana-democrats-selection-lt-governor-candidate?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , in case you missed it.

But really, I just feel incredibly lucky that Indiana already has the best lieutenant governor in the nation, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch.

Suzanne Crouch is a full partner to Governor Holcomb -- everyday, and especially now as we have an all-hands-on-deck effort to safely get Indiana back on track as we continue to fight the coronavirus.

Whether it's looking out for our rural communities, helping Hoosiers find housing security, supporting our tourism industry (especially in these difficult times) or...I know dear to her heart...supporting the most vulnerable Hoosiers among us with disabilities, she's doing great things to lead our state everyday.

Indiana's lucky to have Lt. Governor Crouch, and I know we'll continue to be lucky to have her for another four years as she was Governor Holcomb's first and ONLY choice for the job.

- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Indiana Back on Track: Testing & PPE

Last week when Governor Holcomb unveiled his Back on Track plan (https://backontrack.in.gov/?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , he laid out a phased plan for reopening Indiana over the next two months. It’s data-driven, it’s comprehensive, and it’s focused first on Hoosiers’ health. If you missed it, you can read the full plan and its phases here (https://backontrack.in.gov/?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

One of the guiding principles that will ensure we’re safely getting back on track is ensuring that all Hoosiers who are showing COVID-19 symptoms can get tested. Here's an update on where we are with testing:
* This week, Indiana opened its large-scale, statewide testing program at 20 sites across the state. This will expand to 30 additional sites in the next week. This adds 30,000 more COVID-19 tests a week to Indiana’s statewide testing capacity!
* You can make an appointment for a test by visiting lhi.care/covidtesting or calling 888-634-1116.
* With drive-through clinics, hospitals, local health departments and other community-based sites also testing, there are now more than 120 COVID-19 testing locations throughout the entire state. Find the site closest to you here (https://www.coronavirus.in.gov/2524.htm?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

If the guiding principles of this plan continue to look good -- including numbers of hospitalizations, surge capacity, availability of testing and expanded contact tracing -- then we should complete these five stages July 4. However, that will require the work of all Hoosiers!

But that’s not all that happened this week. Governor Holcomb also announced the opening of the Indiana Small Business PPE Marketplace, which is connecting small business and nonprofit organizations with PPE so they can safely reopen. As Hoosiers return to work, this is another critical component to Indiana’s safe, measured and phased reopening. You can learn more about the Indiana Small Business PPE marketplace here (https://backontrack.in.gov/ppemarketplace.htm?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Twitter (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/holcombforin/?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Thank you to every Hoosier who is doing his or her part to stop the spread of the coronavirus and flatten the curve. We're #INThisTogether, and we're getting #BackOnTrack!

https://action.indiana.gop/get-election-updates-040120/?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Primary Election Resources

Early, in-person voting begins later this month (May 26)! Are you ready? We want to make sure you're ready for Indiana's primary on June 2! Here are the upcoming dates you need to know:
* Thursday, May 14: Traveling Boards Begin
* Thursday, May 21: Deadline for a Request for an Absentee By-Mail Ballot to Be Received by the Clerk or Board of Elections and Registration
* Tuesday, May 26: Early Voting Begins In Person

For a list of upcoming election deadlines and for instructions on how to request an absentee ballot, visit your new Indiana Republican Resource Page here (https://action.indiana.gop/get-election-updates-040120/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

--> Click here to view the Indiana Republican Election Resource Page <-- (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bda8d1e567&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Celebrating Hoosier Teachers & Nurses

This week, we celebrated National Nurses Day and are continuing to celebrate Teacher Appreciation Week! During these difficult times, our teachers and nurses have made many sacrifices to continue serving their communities. From all of us here, we want to say thank you for all that you do for us and for Hoosiers across the state! Thank you!

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb discusses new website to help Hoosiers find testing sites (https://fox59.com/news/coronavirus/gov-holcomb-state-leaders-to-give-update-on-covid-19-pandemic-as-indiana-begins-to-reopen/?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch appoints interim Executive Director of OCRA (https://www.insideindianabusiness.com/story/42096677/lt-governor-appoints-interim-executive-director-of-ocra?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Todd Young promotes helping Hoosiers well-being during the pandemics (https://www.facebook.com/SenatorToddYoung/posts/4327678663924231?__xts__[0]=68.ARDWGrB2c8X8fHKSmEgNpDYMi_bfVzEkkWXLNSL_JycT1o5xANHlZ92rbASO4lepTeltjCAtLyufouDwVUCPUu0vwHS8Jfo9-8o5VBI4d1TvfEVqOFTfxkie3C6vkg24aE6nlzOJw_gp4S349OlSs4Luc0tKzl-i39gtyeOgsZynnMjSXJwzDDtDBC4er2phGyPZWw3DGUAcG96dJKshKvVyW_lbWh3mAkHxDeNG39-_X3c2bsdHCV1ULeHJim6nukX-mA8a19W6Wbezk1FWKWAKUAP-tEaeRtonUCLJTrPawyiZ5vjjhAfPuxg25mv6u1JzWT-HUUDGqagIaX5IQPZQSg&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Mike Braun discusses what we can do to protect nursing home residents (https://www.facebook.com/SenatorBraun/videos/3088109881250058/?__xts__[0]=68.ARCP2awI98d4XOmGJxd3xDEFvGjkJgHSPvo59KiOlLaoCmWLtfkaQo79vLFChS9sYRDpF3KA6rVhY3Nacr7xWzNPtWFSMrcGdi0dOz2H4nppscQoFf5VI4j9yaiv2M3Phn1HQuVxXstZq6AuwwowCnxo8V14r2reItF9rOmvtCfA6YKTq1apzlTGxQtf_WXgPgdz43Bn2h8WKQ5HupDZ6OrP820RecfI5jtIdprG-j_WKU5D9LprtAG4NA7OdpKdHck0mJSQ8kwVpn5RTP51Zfs6xyobClJT75_gu61HupZwnGMD8QU5AwJmlyXS5AxbodCihb217SH5yFR0xbadJrAi2PgPjG3u8JBOwItF&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congresswoman Jackie Walorski introduces bill to financially help college students (https://theracquet.org/9470/showcase/news-release-reps-kind-and-walorski-introduce-bipartisan-fix-to-ensure-college-students-receive-their-fair-share-of-economic-impact-payments/?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Jim Banks to serve on China task force (https://www.insideindianabusiness.com/story/42102749/banks-to-serve-on-china-task-force?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Jim Baird says small businesses can take advantage of state's PPE (https://www.facebook.com/RepJimBaird/posts/575618439738099?__xts__[0]=68.ARDIAeemLuuFgfC9jV-h-yWfNgYrqiCg-ZoHdad3zqwD8_UnzO9sKHET1y9jZBUZQgadLqwdO1Vm2ZjbymTZA0F_McEglQzgm8acCMP-1gm-gMls-k33MfjoS50DbZ-JoHbGxf0cAt2DoLXyCfI8k_FfyhOaUwV5AWjoJtSWN79FJtk__9NHk7GaAOTEPgK0Y7c7CXQ2K9ZVxFwvW4TK4upzKv4VyKbN71NK5iuCY3kwhixNcL8OHQ33K6vqNACU5g7qDDuw_nzmdAYfaoc4Ads3Hd3NsDUxOmzO-V4hd1BQTC4cLKxU6ujVek0rGHyKsoRS5SLUkm78lqtMDI3Vuao&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congresswoman Susan Brooks unveils bipartisan American Drug Independence Act (https://riponadvance.com/stories/brooks-unveils-bipartisan-prescription-for-american-drug-independence-act/?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Greg Pence says he'll go to D.C. to work at this time (https://www.wibc.com/news/coronavirus/cong-greg-pence-i-will-go-to-dc/?mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Larry Bucshon thanks nurses on National Nurses Day (https://www.facebook.com/RepLarryBucshon/photos/a.596242477102440/3025244177535579/?type=3&theater&mc_cid=fd97d8e618&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Booker HQ
subject: Mitch McConnell wants to let states and municipalities go bankrupt.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Cory could use your support on this. |
#
**' Mitch McConnell says cash-strapped states hit by the coronavirus should go bankrupt rather than receive emergency federal aid'**
-Business Insider
4/22/20 Team, Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are holding congressional relief hostage in order to score political points. McConnell recently had the audacity to suggest that cash-strapped state and local governments go bankrupt. And then, he shamefully derided aid for the hardest-hit states as a "blue state bailout." Meanwhile, his Republican allies cut special-interest groups and corporations bailout deals using federal funding that would be better spent helping communities on the front lines. **These are the stakes: if states and municipalities go bankrupt, that means firefighters, police, EMTs, teachers, and more essential public workers will be laid off. Ambulances might be a moment too late. Fire departments can 't reach emergencies fast enough. It could literally mean life or death.** [**Can you add your name to our petition to fund essential state and local governments so they have the resources they need to avoid laying off essential public workers during this crisis?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-petition-state-local-gov-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [SIGN THE PETITION ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-petition-state-local-gov-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
While state and local governments grapple with the effects of an unprecedented health crisis, McConnell and Trump are playing dangerous games that put our country at risk and delay the possibility of economic recovery after this pandemic.
[**In the Senate, Cory has been doing everything he can to secure more resources for state and local governments in the next relief package. If you 're with him, will you add your name to our petition?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-petition-state-local-gov-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
[SIGN THE PETITION ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-petition-state-local-gov-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
There's no reason for us to bail out corporations but then tell states and municipalities to go bankrupt. Not only is it hypocrisy, it's an outrage.
We can't turn our backs on our dedicated public workers and the communities they serve.
Booker HQ
_P.S. Check out[this video](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e1c/5fca0d19/7dae0d2f/291d61e0/1019822629/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1kSHvlf8jH4&feature=youtu.be") and hear from Cory himself about how critical it is to fund state and local governments in the next relief package._
[](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e1c/5fca0d19/7dae0d2f/291d61e0/1019822629/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1kSHvlf8jH4&feature=youtu.be")

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE

We can't turn our backs on our dedicated public workers and the communities they serve. Booker HQ P.S. Check out "" and hear from Cory himself about how critical it is to fund state and local governments in the next relief package. "" PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE ""

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Phonebank to register voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

We need
your help.

Today, our team is launching an aggressive voter registration effort to
win a Democratic majority in the State House and change our government in
Texas for the better.

Obviously, that’s no small undertaking. To accomplish that huge goal, we
need to contact new Texans and help them register to vote for our upcoming
elections.

We have multiple phone banks scheduled to reach out to those folks, which
means we need as many people helping us make calls. Please sign up for a
virtual phonebank with Beto:

Upcoming events:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34367/signup/?source=ema20200508-88352&t=1001&akid=88352%2E444211%2E9KROYe ]Virtual Voter Registration Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34367/signup/?source=ema20200508-88352&t=1002&akid=88352%2E444211%2E9KROYe ]Monday, May 18, 6:30 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34367/signup/?source=ema20200508-88352&t=1003&akid=88352%2E444211%2E9KROYe ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34366/signup/?source=ema20200508-88352&t=1001&akid=88352%2E444211%2E9KROYe ]Virtual Voter Registration Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34366/signup/?source=ema20200508-88352&t=1002&akid=88352%2E444211%2E9KROYe ]Thursday, May 21, 6:30 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34366/signup/?source=ema20200508-88352&t=1003&akid=88352%2E444211%2E9KROYe ]Get more info or RSVP »

The only way we can make things better is if thousands of people – like
you – pitch in and put in the effort to bring new voters into the fold.

We can do this – we’ve gotten so close before, which means we know exactly
how to get across the finish line.

Winning in November starts with us making sure every Texan is registered
to vote. Please help us out and do your part by signing up for one of our
virtual phonebanks.

Thank you for everything,

Powered by People team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=88352%2E444211%2E9KROYe

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Breaking News (via ChristyForCongress.org)
subject: This is really bad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Four days out from the special election, and so much is happening.

**FIRST:** Republicans were turning in ballots faster than Democrats. And national prognosticators sounded the alarm bell that we might lose this Toss-Up race.

**THEN:** Mike Garcia announced a nearly $500,000 new ad buy just THIS WEEK.

**NOW:** Donald Trump tweeted a few minutes ago and asked his millions of Twitter followers to donate to Garcia's campaign (again).

**[We have to act quickly. Rush a donation right now before it's too late. We have to do everything we can to hold on to this seat>> ](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbee/29776869/a6a03fd/569f0668/1875849931/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfdHJ1bXB0d2VldHJyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_trumptweetrr-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbee/29776869/a6a03fd/569f0669/1875849931/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfdHJ1bXB0d2VldHJyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_trumptweetrr-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbee/29776869/a6a03fd/569f066a/1875849931/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfdHJ1bXB0d2VldHJyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_trumptweetrr-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbee/29776869/a6a03fd/569f0665/1875849931/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfdHJ1bXB0d2VldHJyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_trumptweetrr-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbee/29776869/a6a03fd/569f0668/1875849931/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfdHJ1bXB0d2VldHJyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_trumptweetrr-full")
It's one thing for Trump to tweet about this race if nothing much else was happening.

But we're in the midst of a pandemic. Unemployment numbers are higher than they have been since the last recession. And we're far away from things being back to normal.

He's interfering in this race because he wants another rubber stamp member of Congress to support his terrible agenda.

We have the chance to put this to a stop -- but we're going to need a tidal wave of support RIGHT NOW to make it happen.

**[Pitch in whatever you can today to stand up to Donald Trump and Mike Garcia. Don't let them win.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbee/29776869/a6a03fd/569f0668/1875849931/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDhfdHJ1bXB0d2VldHJyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200508_trumptweetrr-full")**

Thanks for stepping up.

\-- Breaking News via ChristyforCongress.org

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Giving back to Law Enforcement [Video]
body:
Dave stopped by the Johnson County Sheriff's Office to brighten their day! | | | [ ](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=88eb551ec6&e=41f8e27552)
---
Click Here to See The Video! Please like and share!
| |
---
| Peter

Today I had the honor of delivering over 350 meals to Sheriff Cal Hayden and our Johnson County Sheriff's Office heroes.

Meals were generously provided by the Great Kansas City Grocer Association. Mr. John McCormick, President and CEO of the Great Kansas City Grocers Association joined the celebration today.

Former Kansas City Chiefs players Bobby Bell, John Lohmeyer, Tony Adams, and Bill Maas (Kansas City Chiefs Ambassadors) also participated in the event. Bringing a lot of fun and excitement to the Johnson County Sheriff's Office.

We appreciate that our first responders take care of us everyday. So, today we wanted to do something to take care of and honor them.

We appreciate the difficult job they do everyday by putting their lives on the line to protect and enhance our communities, and our way of life. They are always there for us, every single moment of every single day. From helping citizens who are stranded on the roads to keeping our communities safe from harm.

We support, honor, and most importantly say THANK YOU to all of our first responders.

We want to encourage a culture of showing appreciation for our first responders.

I hope that others across Kansas will be inspired by our actions today, and say thank you to their first responders.

God Bless,
Dave

---
